DT_ItemAptitudes.dash.Name: Sprint
DT_ItemAptitudes.dash_charge.Description: A continuous, unidirectional sprint atop Hati.
DT_ItemAptitudes.dash_charge.FlavorText:
Move more swiftly atop an enhanced Hati.
New paths may be opened by charging through
breakable walls. Charging into enemies causes
damage and destroys their parts.
DT_ItemAptitudes.dash_charge.Name: Hati's Charge
DT_ItemAptitudes.dash_charge_underwater.FlavorText:
Pierce through the water with an enhanced Motley.
New paths may be opened by swimming through
breakable walls. Charging into enemies will
cause damage and destroy their parts.
DT_ItemAptitudes.dash_charge_underwater.Name: Motley's Torrent
DT_ItemAptitudes.dash.FlavorText:
Allows for faster traversal. Jumping and sprinting
are the key to covering ground more quickly.
DT_ItemAptitudes.dive.FlavorText:
An arcane instrument that allows one to traverse
the waters. With it, attacking, recovery, evasion,
and dashing may be performed just as effortlessly
as on solid ground.
DT_ItemAptitudes.dodge_weak.Name: Dodge
DT_ItemAptitudes.dodge_weak.FlavorText:
Roll away from enemy attacks in the
desired direction.
In its worn state, the mantle offers little aid,
and one must fall back on physical prowess.
DT_ItemAptitudes.dodge.FlavorText:
Dodge attacks by performing a nimble dash in the
desired direction. The runes inscribed into the mantle
allow the wearer to move like unto a swift breeze,
even while airborne.
DT_ItemAptitudes.double_jump.FlavorText:
The rune inscribed into Lilac's shoes allows one
to jump even while in mid-air.
DT_ItemAptitudes.double_jump.Name: Aerial Jump
DT_ItemAptitudes.fast_travel.Description:
Press {0} to open the menu and
select a Respite from the map screen.
DT_ItemAptitudes.fast_travel.FlavorText:
Mount Hati to travel instantaneously to
Respites you have previously visited.
DT_ItemAptitudes.heal.Name: Healing Ward
DT_ItemAptitudes.heal.FlavorText:
Restores Lilac's HP.
While uses are limited, they can
be replenished at Respites.
Charmed magicite, stored within an
argentine vial, responds to the bearer,
invoking a barrier of healing.
DT_ItemAptitudes.high_jump.FlavorText:
The power to launch oneself skyward with the aid
of an enhanced Garm. With it, growths in ceilings
can be destroyed to open new paths.
Enemies unfortunate enough to find themselves
in your way will take damage and have their
parts destroyed.
DT_ItemAptitudes.high_jump.Name: Garm's Ascent
DT_ItemAptitudes.hook.Name: Motley's Magic Strands
DT_ItemAptitudes.hook.FlavorText:
Motley's strands allow for a new form
of traversal. Use hook points to evade
enemies and access new paths.
DT_ItemAptitudes.jump.FlavorText:
Blessed by magic, Lilac is able to jump higher
than any ordinary child.
DT_ItemAptitudes.pile_attack.FlavorText:
Dive while airborne with the aid of Garm.
Diving through growths in the floor will
open new paths, causing damage to enemies
in your way and destroying their parts.
The greater one's height, the more powerful
the dive.
DT_ItemAptitudes.pile_attack.Name: Garm's Iron Stake
DT_ItemAptitudes.sp.Name: Attuner Arts
DT_ItemAptitudes.sp.FlavorText:
Attuners entrust their magic to tuned Homunculi,
enabling them to use unique and powerful attacks.
These abilities are an Attuner's specialty.
DT_ItemAptitudes.wall_charge.Description: While clinging to a wall: hold {0} and release
DT_ItemAptitudes.wall_charge.FlavorText:
A continuous dash through the air, across from
the wall one is clung to. New paths may be
opened by dashing through breakable walls.
Dashing into enemies using this ability will
cause damage and destroy their parts.
DT_ItemAptitudes.wall_grab.Description: In air: press {0} when facing a wall
DT_ItemAptitudes.wall_grab.FlavorText:
Lars' equipment can be used to cling to walls.
With it, one may avoid enemies and
traverse new paths.
DT_ItemAptitudes.wall_charge.Name: Lars' Swift Flight
DT_ItemAptitudes.wall_grab.Name: Lars' Grip

DT_ItemAssists.assist_001.Name: Krios
DT_ItemAssists.assist_001.Description:
Fully restores HP when Lilac
is below {0}% of maximum HP.
One-time use between Respites.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_001.FlavorText:
A magical device designed to ward off harm.
It is engraved with the most intricate runes of
House Milius. One of several Totems.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_002.Name: Taurus
DT_ItemAssists.assist_002.Description:
Activates when damage is taken.
Increases one's defenses for a set period.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_002.FlavorText:
A Totem that protects the bearer.
Although it lacks intelligence, it helps both
Attuners and Homunculi in a manner of ways.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_003.Name: Gemini
DT_ItemAssists.assist_003.FlavorText:
A Totem made to support workers during the
subterranean excavation. Its introduction
led to longer working hours.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_004.Name: Carcinus
DT_ItemAssists.assist_004.Description:
Activates when afflicted with a status effect
and cures it. One-time use between Respites.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_004.FlavorText:
A Totem commonly found in households.
It is often used by families to treat ailments.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_005.Name: Regulus
DT_ItemAssists.assist_005.Description:
Activates with {0}.
Increases attack power for a set period.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_005.FlavorText:
A Totem for Attuners that sought greater power.
It was never mass produced owing to outbreaks
in violence.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_006.Name: Spica
DT_ItemAssists.assist_006.FlavorText:
A Totem created to supplement deficiencies
in magic potential. It is of great benefit
to workers in the Central Stratum, who require
a substantial supply of magic on a daily basis.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_007.Name: Lyra
DT_ItemAssists.assist_007.Description:
Activates with {0}.
Increases attack and defense for a set period.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_007.FlavorText:
A Totem upgraded by Gordon to help repel
Mutants in the Land of Fumes. It is designed
to bolster one's chances in combat.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_008.Name: Ares
DT_ItemAssists.assist_008.Description:
Activates when damage is taken.
SP gauge increases by {0}%.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_008.FlavorText:
A Totem designed to protect the bearer.
Tailored for use by Frost Attuners
by House Milius.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_009.Name: Chiron
DT_ItemAssists.assist_009.Description: Increases the SP gauge by {1}% every {0} seconds.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_009.FlavorText:
A Totem held by the Sorcerer's Academy.
Declan, the first administrator of the academy,
tailored it to suit a sorcerer's needs.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_010.Name: Typhon
DT_ItemAssists.assist_010.FlavorText:
A Totem meant to aid in the investigation of
dangerous terrain. It was prototyped to help
reduce the burden of the Blight; however, few
Homunculi were able to withstand its effects.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_011.Name: Ilion
DT_ItemAssists.assist_011.Description:
Offers no passive effects, but increases the
number of Healing Ward recoveries by {0}.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_011.FlavorText:
A Totem equipped with charmed magicite.
Designed to help protect one's loved ones,
it specializes in Healing Wards.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_012.Name: Cetus
DT_ItemAssists.assist_012.Description:
Fully restores both HP and SP when
Lilac is below {0}% of maximum HP.
One-time use between Respites.
DT_ItemAssists.assist_012.FlavorText:
The first Totem ever fabricated.
A total of twelve kinds were created
at the Arcane Factory.

DT_ItemCostumes.p0000.Name: Sorcerer's Academy Uniform
DT_ItemCostumes.p0000.Description:
A uniform worn by students attending
the Sorcerer's Academy. It is said to be
modeled after the garbs worn by the sorcerers
of old in the Land of Fumes.
DT_ItemCostumes.p0010.Name: Azure Mantle
DT_ItemCostumes.p0010.Description:
The mantle of the Attuner who saved Levy in
Old City. Its vibrant blue hues are symbolic
of the Attuners of House Frost.
DT_ItemCostumes.p0011.Name: Attuner's Mantle Ex
DT_ItemCostumes.p0011.Description:
A black mantle that was designed to be worn
by sorcerers of the Land of the Fumes.
These days, it is adorned by Attuners that
were once sorcerers themselves.
A wind rune has been inscribed into it.
DT_ItemCostumes.p0020.Name: Attuner's Mantle
DT_ItemCostumes.p0020.Description:
A black mantle that was designed to be worn
by sorcerers of the Land of the Fumes.
These days, it is adorned by Attuners that
were once sorcerers themselves.
A wind rune has been inscribed into it.
DT_ItemCostumes.p0021.Name: Attuner's Mantle Ex 2
DT_ItemCostumes.p0021.Description:
A black mantle that was designed to be worn
by sorcerers of the Land of the Fumes.
These days, it is adorned by Attuners that
were once sorcerers themselves.
A wind rune has been inscribed into it.
DT_ItemCostumes.p0030.Name: Mantle of Milius
DT_ItemCostumes.p0030.Description:
A mantle bearing the coat of arms of House Milius.
It represents a desire to someday explore the
world beyond the Land of Fumes.
DT_ItemCostumes.p0031.Name: Mantle of Milius Ex
DT_ItemCostumes.p0031.Description:
A mantle bearing the coat of arms of House Milius.
It represents a desire to someday explore the
world beyond the Land of Fumes.
DT_ItemCostumes.p0040.Name: Levy's Mantle
DT_ItemCostumes.p0040.Description:
A mantle fashioned by Levy for Lilac.
It has been made using items scavenged
from the Lower Stratum.
DT_ItemCostumes.p0041.Name: Levy's Mantle Ex
DT_ItemCostumes.p0041.Description:
A mantle fashioned by Levy for Lilac.
It has been made using items scavenged
from the Lower Stratum.
DT_ItemCostumes.p0042.Name: Levy's Mantle Ex 2
DT_ItemCostumes.p0042.Description:
A mantle fashioned by Levy for Lilac.
It has been made using items scavenged
from the Lower Stratum.
DT_ItemCostumes.p0050.Name: White Priestess' Attire
DT_ItemCostumes.p0050.Description:
Dazzling white raiments that almost appear
to shimmer. They exude a mysterious aura,
quite unlike magic.
DT_ItemCostumes.p0051.Name: White Priestess' Attire Ex
DT_ItemCostumes.p0051.Description:
Dazzling white raiments that almost appear
to shimmer. They exude a mysterious aura,
quite unlike magic.
DT_ItemCostumes.p0060.Name: Land's End Priestess Garb
DT_ItemCostumes.p0060.Description:
Designed after priestesses from Land's End,
a realm beyond the Land of Fumes.
It emits a faint mystic power,
somewhat different from regular magic.

DT_ItemCurrencies.default.Description: Materials can be used to fabricate items at the craftory.
DT_ItemCurrencies.default.FlavorText:
Arcane instruments are fashioned using magicite, 
metals, and other such resources.
DT_ItemCurrencies.default.Name: Materials
DT_ItemCurrencies.grade.Description:
Memory fragments can be used
to unlock extra content.
DT_ItemCurrencies.grade.Name: Fragments
DT_ItemCurrencies.rare.Description: Can be used to enhance Relics at refineries.
DT_ItemCurrencies.rare.FlavorText:
Waste that can be used for enhancing
arcane instruments is known as scrap.
DT_ItemCurrencies.rare.Name: Scrap

DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0020_miner.Description:
An all-purpose Homunculus dispatched to
the Magicite Mine. It is fitted with old parts and
has little resistance to the Fumes.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0021_miner.Description:
A Homunculus fitted with a drill to mine bedrock.
Its poor balance makes it prone to falling over.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0022_miner.Description:
A Homunculus fitted with explosives.
Its shoulder joints are worn from overuse,
making it unable to hurl objects very far.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0025_miner.Description:
A Homunculus with greatly improved physical
prowess. Originally designed to quell Mutants,
it gradually descended into madness upon being
covered in Mutant blood, and is now little
more than a Mutant itself.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0026_miner.Description:
An improved Homunculus designed to quell Mutants.
Its physical capabilities put too great a strain
on its core, often causing it to combust.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0030_guard.Description:
A Homunculus guard, driven to madness
by the Fumes. It was in the service of
distinguished residents in the Upper Stratum,
but fell to the Lower Stratum after
a mob of Mutants attacked it.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0031_guard.Description:
A Homunculus guard that serves Gilroy.
Sturdy and equipped with a shield,
it is designed to be highly durable.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0032_guard.Description:
A Homunculus guard that serves Gilroy.
Even after turning Mutant, it remains faithful
to its master's orders, dispatching intruders
in the Upper Stratum.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0033_guard.Description:
A Homunculus guard that serves Gilroy.
It is superior to the Type 1 and Type 2 models
in its command of magic, which is reflected in
the greater costs required to manufacture it.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0040_waste.Description:
A Homunculus prototype.
It was discarded before it could
be completed into a humanoid form.
It is missing its lower half.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0041_waste.Description:
An abandoned Homunculus prototype.
It is equipped with the ability to filter and purify
toxins in its vicinity. Since turning into a Mutant,
it insteads spreads the toxins it was processing.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0042_waste.Description:
A Homunculus exiled to the Lower Stratum.
In the aftermath of an act of misconduct, it was
subjected to surgery that deprived it of its
physical autonomy. Its tail duct is used
for both feeding and excretion.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0050_vagrant.Description:
A Homunculus that was experimented upon beneath
the surface. While proficient with weapons,
it is highly unstable and prone to outbursts.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0051_vagrant.Description:
A Homunculus subjected to experiments beneath
the surface. Brandishing an old flamethrower,
it was assigned to exterminate rats and other
common pests. When it senses danger, it has a
tendency to blow flames in a haphazard manner,
causing fires.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0052_vagrant.Description:
The result of Homunculus experiments conducted
beneath the surface. Equipped with a chainsaw,
they were used to break down waste material.
In time, they began to find a strange joy in
the act of demolition itself. Now free to roam,
they wander, still driven by that same urge.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0060_orc.Description:
A Homunculus with an enormous physique.
Its body is covered in scars, and part
of the core in its chest is exposed,
suggesting it underwent some manner
of surgical experimentation.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0061_orc.Description:
A Homunculus created through experimentation.
The machine on its back is able to convert
magic into an electrical current, making it
useful for a variety of work, such as at
construction sites.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0062_orc.Description:
A test subject equipped with an arcane instrument
that allows it to breathe underwater for extended
periods. It can remain submerged, but the water
pressure makes it difficult for its large body to
move freely.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0070_pod.Description:
A Homunculus designed for aerial surveillance in
the Lower Stratum. It fires projectiles at targets
that enter its range. It appears to have been built
using leftover parts, which may explain why it
malfunctions often.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0071_pod.Description:
A Homunculus designed for aerial surveillance in
the Lower Stratum. Its flexible joints allow it a
wide range of motion, making the circular saw it
wields even more dangerous.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0072_pod.Description:
A flying Homunculus that patrols a wide area.
It fires magic homing bullets from its firearms.
It was built using parts that are mass-produced,
giving its body a uniform appearance.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0073_pod.Description:
A flying Homunculus that patrols a wide area.
It is equipped a newly designed magic amplifier,
allowing it to emit an unceasing wave of energy.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0074_pod.Description:
A Homunculus designed for aquatic surveillance.
Fittingly, it is able to fire air bubbles imbued
with magic.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0075_pod.Description:
A Homunculus designed for aquatic patrol.
It makes use of jet propulsion to steer itself
into targets with great force.
Avoid contact with its sharp head.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0080_cannon.Description:
A turret that can be mounted on the ground, walls,
and even ceilings. Its flexibility of use has made
it a widely-deployed defensive measure.
Capable of firing large beams fueled by magic.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0090_army.Description:
A Homunculus guard developed by House Milius.
It employs an arcane instrument shaped like
a baton. The rust on its body betrays its age.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0091_army.Description:
A Homunculus guard developed by House Milius.
Its agility allows it to maintain a safe distance
in combat. It is equipped with a shield for good
measure, and the bayonet it carries allows it to
attack from a long range.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0100_mimic.Description:
The remains of Homunculi long forsaken.
In their desperation to live, their bodies have
conjoined, allowing them to survive.
They are forced to conserve their magic, and lie in
wait for unsuspecting prey to draw close.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0103_mimic.Description:
An autonomous dumpster, created to dispose of waste.
It is able to move by combining and manipulating the
components it has amassed inside.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0110_chief.Description:
A large Homunculus designed for security purposes.
Its body is made up of reinforced components
imported from foreign lands, making it
extremely sturdy.
The word “Asura” is engraved on the back
of its head.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0120_wheeler.Description:
Heavy mining equipment manned by a Homunculus
laborer. The shovel attached to the end of its arm
can break through hard bedrock... which means
it can also be used as a weapon.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0121_wheeler.Description:
Heavy mining equipment manned by a Homunculus
laborer. The tube on its back contains a supply
of magic, and requires a special device for it
to ignite.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0122_wheeler.Description:
Squad Leader of Magicite Mining Unit 1.
He exists solely to work, and his duties occupy
his every thought, save for when he is asleep.
Loathed by his subordinates for forcing them
to labor, he often resents his station.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0130_golem.Description:
A large Homunculus employed in the Magicite Mine.
The excavator on its arm is capable of breaking
through tough bedrock.
An older model, it is poorly suited to tasks
that require finesse, and has been assigned
to heavy labor as a result.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0131_golem.Description:
A large Homunculus employed at the factory.
It possesses more destructive power and mobility
than older models, but still relies on brute force.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0140_worm.Description:
A Homunculus designed to conduct
magicite surveys in the depths.
It moves swiftly, allowing it to examine
a large number of deposits with efficiency.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0141_worm.Description:
A Homunculus designed to conduct
magicite surveys in the depths.
The mouth-like orifice is used to expel
an acid capable of dissolving obstructions.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0150_dweller.Description:
Large primordial creatures that dwell deep
below the Magicite Mine. They were scheduled
for extermination until researchers took note
of their affinity for detecting magicite.
They have been fitted with devices to help
control them.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0160_gang.Description:
A mercenary squad taken in by House Frost.
At one time, they guarded the tower that housed
the Shackled Beast, but have now succumbed to
the Fumes and become Mutants.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0161_gang.Description:
A mercenary squad taken in by House Frost.
Possessing great upper-body strength, they wield
 their signature ball-and-chain weapons effortlessly.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0162_gang.Description:
A member of a mercenary group taken in by
House Frost. A confidant of the Shackled Beast,
he has driven back countless Milius invasions.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0170_forester.Description:
A primordial creature native to the forest.
Through a process of augmentation, they have
been turned into Mutants.
These are the males of the species, lacking the
crystalized horns and spikes of the females.
They taunt their prey by kicking at the ground
with their abnormally-developed hind legs,
then close in to attack with both arms.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0171_forester.Description:
A primordial creature native to the forest.
Through a process of augmentation, they have
been turned into Mutants.
The females of the species can be identified
by their crystalized horns.
Their legs are even stronger than those of their
male counterparts, enabling them to charge
aggressively at their prey.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0180_wolf.Description:
Once gentle in demeanor, these native creatures
have been modified into aggressive Mutants.
Now, they roam the forest in their new forms,
relentless and unyielding in their pursuit.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0190_moth.Description:
A primitive organism native to the forest that
has been turned into a Mutant.
They would originally tempt prey by releasing
their scales into the air. Following their
alteration, their scales have turned highly toxic.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0191_moth.Description:
A primitive organism native to the forest that
has been turned into a Mutant.
While they may exhibit different coloration
depending on their habitat, their nature remains
consistent across the species.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0192_moth.Description:
A primitive organism native to the forest that
has been turned into a Mutant.
While they may exhibit different coloration
depending on their habitat, their nature remains
consistent across the species.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0200_scarab.Description:
A Homunculus designed for the purpose of
collecting waste. The waste it collects is
then sent to the Central Stratum and recycled
into components for Homunculi.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0201_scarab.Description:
A Homunculus designed to aid in waste collection.
It razes the ground using an iron ball to clear
a path for other Homunculi.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0202_scarab.Description:
A Homunculus designed to aid in waste collection.
It uses powerful explosives to create passages
through tough bedrock.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0203_scarab.Description:
A Homunculus created for waste collection.
The Attuner, Yarrow, found himself trapped
inside its large ball of garbage.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0210_spider.Description:
A Homunculus designed to serve as a lookout.
Suspended by a thread, it keeps a watchful gaze
over its surroundings, intercepting trespassers.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0211_spider.Description:
A Homunculus designed to carry out waste surveys.
Using walls as its vantage point, it scans for
waste buried beneath the ground. It also makes
for an effective escort to other Homunculi.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0212_spider.Description:
A Homunculus designed to carry out waste surveys.
Using ceilings as its vantage point, it scans for
waste buried beneath the ground. It also makes
for an effective escort to other Homunculi.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0220_security.Description:
A Homunculus dispatched to guard students at the
Sorcerer's Academy. Outfitted in silver armor,
and wielding a crested shield and arcane lance,
it makes for an impressive symbol of authority.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0221_security.Description:
A Homunculus dispatched to guard
the Upper Stratum.
Clad in jet-black arcane armor, it wields
its blade with deadly skill.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0222_security.Description:
Captain of the Guard, Velius leads the forces
that watch over the Upper Stratum and protect
the Empyrean Parasol.
He has rarely ever left his station, which led
to him becoming a close friend and confidante
of Gilroy's.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0230_researcher.Description:
A Homunculus assigned to serve as an instructor
at the Sorcerer's Academy. Fire is considered to
be the basis of all magic, as well as the most
versatile element of all.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0231_researcher.Description:
A Homunculus assigned to serve as an instructor
at the Sorcerer's Academy. Ice, unlike fire,
has long been a difficult element to command.
Ice, it would appear, chooses its own master.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0232_researcher.Description:
A Homunculus assigned to serve as an instructor
at the Sorcerer's Academy. Magic that has its
roots in lightning has long been used for the
advancement of magic-based technology, and is
popular among aspiring arcane smiths.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0233_researcher.Description:
A Homunculus employed as a professor at
the Sorcerer's Academy.
One of the two main faculty along with Izabel,
with whom she developed a close friendship.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0240_chimera.Description:
A profane creature birthed from an experiment.
The exact purpose of the experiment and how
it was carried out remain unclear, as most records
pertaining to it have been destroyed.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0241_chimera.Description:
A Homunculus that was abandoned after
the experiment it was part of ran into
an unexpected complication.
It lacks sentience, but will defend itself
by expelling a strong acid when threatened.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0250_ninja.Description:
A Homunculus created by the sorcerer, Declan.
It will easily overwhelm an unwary opponent.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0251_ninja.Description:
A Homunculus created by the sorcerer, Declan.
It prefers to attack from a distance, employing
diversionary tools such as smoke bombs to create
an opening.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0252_ninja.Description:
A Homunculus created by Declan.
Built atop the strides made with No. 7,
it boasts impressive combat capabilities.
It has been designed with an aggressive
personality, and is a fighter at the Arena Tower.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0253_ninja.Description:
A Homunculus created by Declan.
Built atop the strides made with No. 7,
she boasts impressive combat capabilities.
Her caring nature endeared her to the marionettes
at Declan's estate during her time there.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0260_komuso.Description:
A Homunculus created by the sorcerer, Declan.
It boasts a sturdy exoskeleton equipped with
an amplifier, which allows it to wield its hefty
extendable weapon with ease.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0261_komuso.Description:
A Homunculus created by the sorcerer, Declan.
Equipped with a pioneering sensory mechanism,
it can pinpoint targets with deadly accuracy
and unleash a combination of telekinetic suction
and shockwave attacks using its wand.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0262_komuso.Description:
A Homunculus created by the sorcerer Declan.
Built atop the strides made with No. 7,
he boasts impressive combat capabilities.
He admires No. 7's strength, and enjoys
sparring with him.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0270_doll.Description:
A Homunculus created by Declan.
It has been dressed in the garb of a foreign land,
and its mannerisms calibrated to match.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0272_doll.Description:
A Homunculus created by Declan.
Its facial features are sculpted to suit his tastes.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0273_doll.Description:
A Homunculus created by Declan. Marionettes were
often subjected to inhumane treatment, leading
to the manifestation of trauma.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0274_doll.Description:
A Homunculus created by Declan.
It is clad in an exquisite foreign garb
known as a kimono.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0275_doll.Description:
A Homunculus created by Declan.
Homunculi that Declan disliked were
imprisoned within holding cells
and subjected to ceaseless torture.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0276_doll.Description:
A Homunculus created by Declan.
It is said that, in the past, attempts have been
made to rescue marionettes from imprisonment.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0277_doll.Description:
A Homunculus created by Declan.
Its hair is a wig that Declan changes
in accordance with his moods.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0280_banshee.Description:
A Homunculus created by Declan.
This is its defensive form, outfitted with
a torture device designed to resemble a flower.
Designed to dispatch trespassers without
discretion, it is the very embodiment
of Declan's twisted tastes.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0281_banshee.Description:
A Homunculus created by Declan.
It was attempting to escape Declan's estate
by stealing a key. Suspecting treachery,
Declan activated its defensive mode after
he saw it conversing with Lilac.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0290_basilisk.Description:
Reptilian creatures native to the forest.
Through a process of augmentation, they have
been turned into Mutants.
The males of the species can be identified
by the flower-like organs on their bodies.
They feed on poisonous plants and expel
the same poison when threatened.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0291_basilisk.Description:
Reptilian creatures native to the forest.
Through a process of augmentation, they have
been turned into Mutants.
Unlike their male counterparts, the females
of the species lack the flower-like organ.
They tend to be more wary than the males and
protect themselves using their razor-sharp
tails and horns.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0300_server.Description:
A Homunculus designed for support and general aid.
They are able to emit a magical field to provide
medical treatment when necessary. If an experiment
goes awry, these Homunculi are typically the first
responders.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0301_server.Description:
A Homunculus created exclusively to assist Luiseach.
It is capable of emitting a magical field to provide
first aid, but will only respond to Luíseach.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0310_aegis.Description:
A Homunculus designed for defense by House Frost.
When it detects an intruder, it fires magic bullets
in all directions, capable of tracking its target.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0311_aegis.Description:
A Homunculus guard created by House Milius.
When a trespasser enters its range, it unleashes a
barrage of magic projectiles that track the enemy.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0320_robot.Description:
A Homunculus enforcer that can be deployed
on the ground, as well as in the air.
It will pursue its target unrelentingly
for as long as its generator remains active.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0330_generator.Description:
A machine at the factory designed
to manufacture Homunculi.
While it has no offensive capabilities
of its own, it will produce Homunculi
enforcers unceasingly until it is destroyed.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0340_professor.Description:
A support Homunculus assigned to the Sorcerer's
Academy and Biological Research Facility.
While they presently assist with magic lessons at
the academy, they were originally used to perform
dangerous experiments at the research facility.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0341_professor.Description:
A support Homunculus assigned to the Sorcerer's
Academy and Biological Research Facility.
They are designed to attack without discretion,
in the event that a state of emergency is declared.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0370_mouse.Description:
A primitive creature, modified and enhanced
for use in experiments. It is fiercer,
more resilient, and reaches maturity more
quickly than normal rats.
Capable of being produced en masse.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0380_raven.Description:
A Homunculus created by fusing a bird and a human.
It is no longer able to process human food, and
instead absorbs the magic stored in plants through
a rectal tube.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0381_raven.Description:
A Homunculus created by fusing a bird and a human.
A mishap during the fusion surgery caused an
excessive buildup of magic, resulting in tumors
sprouting all over its body.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0390_nest.Description:
A device that manufactures Reinforced Lab Rats
for use in experiments. Wild rats are fed to the
device, and processed into the reinforced variant.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0400_diver.Description:
A Homunculus designed for underwater surveillance.
It was modeled after a mermaid, and its large fins
allow it to easily navigate through water.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0401_diver.Description:
A Homunculus designed for underwater surveillance.
It is equipped with a shield and harpoon for combat
under water.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0410_piranha.Description:
A Homunculus that resembles a tropical fish,
kept by Declan. Armed with a ferocious bite,
they often swarm their prey in groups.
In place of sight, they pinpoint their prey
through the use of evolved organs sensitive
to the magical wavelength.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0420_crab.Description:
A Homunculus created to gather resources
underwater. Modeled after horseshoe crabs,
they are able to move swiftly in water.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0430_eye.Description:
A magic surveillance machine that is stationed
underwater. Its large, restless eye watches
tirelessly for trespassers. When it sights one,
the machine discharges an electric current.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0431_eye.Description:
A magic surveillance machine that is stationed
underwater. When a trespasser draws close, it
releases spikes from its body and self-destructs.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0440_tank.Description:
A Homunculus created for underwater exploration.
Scrap and various parts from other organisms are
attached to its back. Modified to clean sludge
from the ocean floor, it discharges waste it is
unable to decompose.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0450_wisp.Description:
An entity of primordial power that inhabits
the Land of Origin. It is unclear as to
whether they possess a resistance to
the Fumes... or, indeed, even a consciousness.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0460_sludge.Description:
A scrapped Homunculus prototype that suffers
from a number of defects. It can often be found
attached to a wall, doing nothing at all.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0490_seed.Description:
A primordial creature that inhabits
the Land of Origin. It is able to
take root anywhere—on the ground,
walls, or even ceilings—never moving
once it has.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0500_tentacle.Description:
A primordial organism that can be found
in the Land of Origin.
Separate organisms extending from the floor
and ceiling fuse together, rooting firmly
in place to form a sturdy wall.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0510_ray.Description:
A primordial entity that inhabits
the Land of Origin.
Rich in magical energies, the very environment
of the Land of Origin serves as its source
of power, allowing it to defy gravity despite
its size.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0520_sinker.Description:
A Homunculus that prowls the Crystalline Realm in
the Lower Stratum. It is able to attack from afar
by launching an anchor, and is equipped with an
arcane instrument that acts as a magnet, allowing
it to make use of the magnetism in the ground to
cling to walls.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0530_skeleton.Description:
Discarded bodies of test subjects from the
Biological Research Facility.
They appear too frightened to pose any threat,
with some unable to move or only drag themselves
along the ground.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0531_skeleton.Description:
Discarded bodies of test subjects from the
Biological Research Facility.
They appear too frightened to pose any threat,
with some unable to move or only drag themselves
along the ground.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e0532_skeleton.Description:
Discarded bodies of test subjects from the
Biological Research Facility.
They appear too frightened to pose any threat,
with some unable to move or only drag themselves
along the ground.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e2030_sector.Description:
A large Homunculus that manufactures Homunculi.
She works in tandem with Velgrynd, also located
at the Arcane Factory.
Powerful runes have been employed to dull her
will and keep her subservient.
Gilroy's orders to protect the nation at all cost
have led to the uncontrolled mass-manufacture
of Homunculi.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e5003_reaper.Description:
A combat Homunculus designed to spar with Nola
and help improve her prowess in battle.
Following her creation, Nola trained with
the Aggressor on a daily basis before she
was allowed to venture beyond the premises.
Most of the Upper Stratum remains unaware
of the existence of Nola or the Aggressor.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e5010_lancer.Description:
A Homunculus that was once in the service
of the Attuner Joran. Dubbed the “Lucent Knight”
due to his appearance, he led the Homunculi
of House Frost.
When war broke out between Milius and Frost,
he took to the front lines and is said never
to have met defeat at the hands of an opponent.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e5012_lancer.Description:
A Homunculus that was once in the service
of the Attuner Joran. Dubbed the “Lucent Knight”
due to his appearance, he led the Homunculi
of House Frost.
When war broke out between Milius and Frost,
he took to the front lines and is said never
to have met defeat at the hands of an opponent.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e5030_rogue.Description:
A discarded test subject from a Homunculus
processing plant. He was one of many Homunculi
that were exposed to the Fumes as part of an
experiment to observe how long they could
withstand its effects before turning rabid.
As the Fumes took hold, hordes of Homunculi
tore through one another, climbing the resulting
pile of corpses in a frenzied bid to escape.
Lito survived by being buried beneath the pile.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e5050_ronin.Description:
A combat Homunculus specially modified by
the sorcerer, Declan. His body was meticulously
picked out from a tribe of warriors hailing
from a foreign land, and subjected to a series
of experiments that imbued it with a
formidable strength. His peculiar appearance
and exotic weaponry reflect Declan's
eccentric taste. Repulsed by Declan's treatment
of Homunculi, he plotted in secret to slay him.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e5060_beast.Description:
Tempered into a formidable weapon by experiments
conducted by House Milius, this Homunculus was
abandoned by his former masters after proving too
difficult to control. He was subsequently tasked with
exploring the lowest depths of the Land of Fumes,
from whence few ever re-emerge.
But emerge he did... and with an Attuner in tow.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e5070_witch.Description:
A Homunculus that manages the Sorcerer's Academy.
Modeled after the sorcerer Declan, she has a
natural gift for sorcery, as well an unusually
inquisitive nature, explaining her past tenure
at the Biological Research Facility.
She harbors a strong admiration for humans,
a trait that it is believed she was born with.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e5110_gunman.Description:
An experimental Homunculus that escaped to
Old City from the Biological Research Facility
in the Central Stratum. Experiments involving
animal fusion were conducted on Yolvan by
a renowned Homunculus researcher who fled
a neighboring country that is no more.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e5200_pounder.Description:
A large prototype Homunculus made to work
at the Magicite Mine. The excavator on his arm
is capable of breaking through tough bedrock.
He once worked at the Arcane Factory, where
he was chosen by Cain Milius to undergo
a new experimental modification—a process that
was interrupted when a widespread riot began,
carried out by Homunculi.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e5230_finder.Description:
Captain of the Lower Stratum Depths Survey Team,
Lars was investigating the Land of Origin
alongside Lilia and Nola.
Owing to his durability and regenerative
capabilities, he is able to withstand the harsh
conditions in the Land of Origin.
Amiable and considerate, he is rarely known
to turn someone away.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e6000_rider.Description:
The guardian of the forest, greatly feared
by the inhabitants of the nearby village.
After House Milius invaded, the forest was
turned into a testing ground for their research,
and no creature spared from the experiments...
Including the guardian himself.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e6010_cluster.Description:
Motley's Mutant form that would hoard garbage,
driven by a fear of losing even more than he
already has. So vast was his collection of refuse
that the other Homunculi at the disposal site
revered him, referring to him as a king.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e6020_director.Description:
A large Homunculus that manufactures Homunculi.
Possessing a more aggressive nature than Velnest,
he enjoys disposing of Homunculi that have
ceased to function.
He would often receive visits from Cain Milius,
who was said to be fond of him.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e6030_owner.Description:
Creator of the Homunculi and younger brother
of Lord Cain Milius.
Declan was a foremost expert in the field
of magic, and a gifted arcane smith,
earning him the title of Grand Sorcerer.
It is said that his nature and outlook changed
dramatically after becoming acquainted with
the priestess Abelia.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e6040_darker.Description:
An experimental prototype created at the
Biological Research Facility by exploiting
the properties of Blight. As a result of
the Blight experiments involved in its creation,
it has undergone a dramatic mutation.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e6050_master.Description:
A unique Homunculus created using a biological
replica of Lord Cain Milius.
Gilroy was intended to succeed Cain Milius,
but did not believe he was worthy,
and wished instead for Motley to assume
the position of Lord of House Milius.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e6051_master.Description:
A unique Homunculus created using a biological
replica of Lord Cain Milius.
After he turned Mutant, it became increasingly
challenging for Gilroy to sustain the barrier,
requiring him to regularly change his parts
and equipment to slow the Blight's effects.
DT_ItemEnemyInfo.e6052_master.Description:
A unique Homunculus created using a biological
replica of Lord Cain Milius.
Cain created another Homunculus, Magnolia,
to assist Gilroy in his duty. Magnolia grew
attached to Gilroy, who in turn loved her
like a younger sister.

DT_ItemEquipments.armor_001.Name: Worn Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_001.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_001.FlavorText:
Bracelets crafted in the Land of Fumes.
Inscribed with runes, they were discarded in
droves in the Lower Stratum when they
lost their powers.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_002.Name: Crude Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_002.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_002.FlavorText:
A bracelet of rather poor quality, found
in Old City. Commonly worn by the city's
inhabitants for protection against the magical
infestation emanating from the underground.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_003.Name: Thistle Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_003.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_003.FlavorText:
A bracelet marked with the rune of a thorn.
Technological advancements have made it
possible for these to be produced in bulk,
but there was a time when only the
arcane smiths of House Milius possessed
the adequate knowledge and skill to craft them.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_004.Name: Stone Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_004.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_004.FlavorText:
A bracelet marked with the rune of a stone.
For many a year, House Milius, a family of renowned
arcane smiths, flourished by fashioning these and
a variety of other such arcane instruments.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_005.Name: Bone Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_005.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_005.FlavorText:
A bracelet marked with the rune of a bone.
A bevy of magical resources lie beneath the
surface of the Land of Fumes. Indeed, what we
call “Fumes” is their magic seeping through
the ground.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_006.Name: Dagger Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_006.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_006.FlavorText:
A bracelet marked with the rune of a dagger.
While skilled sorcerers may wield magic as they
please, those that have not been trained in the
ways of magic turn to arcane instruments, which
serve as a conduit for channeling the elements.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_007.Name: Chloe's Bracelet
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_007.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_007.FlavorText:
A distinctive bracelet engraved with the name
of an Attuner—Chloe. Judging by the intricate
craftsmanship, it was likely a gift from
a loved one.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_008.Name: Crimson Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_008.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_008.FlavorText:
A trinket worn long ago by the Ancients.
It is engraved with runes, and a faded,
red root wraps around it.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_009.Name: Flower Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_009.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_009.FlavorText:
A bracelet marked with the rune of a flower.
Its ornate detailing makes it a fine gift.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_010.Name: Beast Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_010.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_010.FlavorText:
A bracelet marked with the rune of a beast.
It is said that the pattern engraved upon it
reflects the tastes of the arcane smith who
crafted it, and his magical proficiency.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_011.Name: Central Stratum Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_011.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_011.FlavorText:
A bracelet commonly worn by workers in the
Central Stratum. Large quantities of these
were manufactured at the factory and used
as an export item.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_012.Name: Yggdrasil Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_012.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_012.FlavorText:
A bracelet marked with the rune of Yggdrasil.
A vast amount of the magic present in
the Land of Fumes dwells within its
trees and stones.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_013.Name: Spire Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_013.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_013.FlavorText:
A bracelet marked with the rune of a spire.
The more magicite contained within,
the greater the effect of the arcane instrument.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_014.Name: Abelia's Bracelet
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_014.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_014.FlavorText:
An arcane instrument that belonged to
the Lord of House Frost. A gift from
House Milius as a token of friendship.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_015.Name: Declan's Binds
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_015.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_015.FlavorText:
An arcane instrument that emits an eerie magic.
Declan fastened these specialized restraints
onto his test subjects to ensure their
cooperation in his experiments.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_016.Name: Lunar Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_016.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_016.FlavorText:
A bracelet marked with the rune of a moon.
Grants the wearer serenity and solace.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_017.Name: Sol Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_017.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_017.FlavorText:
A bracelet marked with the rune of a sun.
Like the unyielding rays of the sun,
it protects the wearer and grants them
the strength to overcome hardship.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_018.Name: Aster Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_018.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_018.FlavorText:
A bracelet marked with the rune of a star.
A fine piece of jewelry, generously inset
with magicite. Meticulously crafted to
evoke the stars in the night sky.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_019.Name: Upper Stratum Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_019.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_019.FlavorText:
A bracelet embedded with special-grade magicite.
It is designed to shield the wearer from most
threats, but even it can't withstand the
Blighted Rain of Death.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_020.Name: Ancient's Fury
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_020.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_020.FlavorText:
An ominous artifact left behind by the Ancients,
said to have been worn by their priestesses.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_021.Name: Celestial Bangle
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_021.Description:
Improves stats, primarily defense.
Up to two bracelets can be equipped at a time.
DT_ItemEquipments.armor_021.FlavorText:
A bracelet marked with a rune depicting
celestial rays. Bangles were the creation
of Cain Milius, Lord of House Milius and
a master craftsman.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_001.Name: Protective Carapace
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_001.Description:
Press {0} to activate a barrier that momentarily
nullifies enemy attacks.
When timed correctly, it unleashes a shockwave,
knocking enemies back.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_001.FlavorText:
An arcane instrument shaped like a seashell.
It deploys a protective barrier. Its portability
and ease-of-use have led to widespread adoption,
both locally and in far-off lands.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_002.Name: Enhancer
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_002.Description:
Improves stats, but does not grant
any additional actions.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_002.FlavorText:
Arcane instruments that enhance one's physical
capabilities. They are fashioned from magicite,
imbuing them with magic in the process.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_003.Name: Reflective Carapace
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_003.FlavorText:
An arcane instrument that emits a magic
barrier. Carapaces were essential during duels
between sorcerers, as these would involve the
use of highly-dangerous magic.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_003.Description:
Press {0} to activate a barrier that momentarily
nullifies enemy attacks.
When successful, it counters with a magic bullet
that can reach even distant enemies.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_004.Name: Pyroflective Carapace
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_004.FlavorText:
An arcane instrument that deploys a protective
magic barrier. Fire has been an element long
feared by sorcerers and witches alike.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_004.Description:
Press {0} to activate a barrier that momentarily
nullifies enemy attacks.
When timed correctly, it is followed up by
a counterattack that fires flames at the
enemy, and has a chance to inflict
the Blaze status effect.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_005.Name: Impact Carapace
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_005.FlavorText:
An arcane instrument that deploys
a protective magic barrier.
While it requires finesse to use, it remains
a favorite among a number of sorcerers.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_005.Description:
Press {0} to activate a barrier that momentarily
nullifies enemy attacks.
When timed correctly, a counterattack
in the form of a shockwave will follow.
Effective against surrounding enemies.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_006.Name: High Enhancer
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_006.Description:
Improves stats, but does not grant
any additional actions.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_006.FlavorText:
An arcane instrument used to enhance one's
physical abilities. Now inscribed with more
complex runes, it is even more effective.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_007.Name: Blessed Carapace
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_007.FlavorText:
An arcane instrument used for protecting
oneself from an enemy's assault.
It is said that a prayer ring from Land's End
served as the blueprint for this Carapace.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_007.Description:
Press {0} to activate a barrier that momentarily
nullifies enemy attacks.
While it offers only a brief window of defense,
{1}% HP is regained when timed correctly.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_008.Name: Primordial Heirloom
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_008.Description:
Improves stats, but does not grant
any additional actions.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_008.FlavorText:
An amulet that is similar in its purpose to
arcane instruments. It was created by the
Ancients, utilizing primordial creatures
that were living vessels of magic.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_009.Name: Luiseach's Carapace
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_009.FlavorText:
A unique prototype for an arcane instrument,
devised by Luiseach, inventor of the Carapaces.
It is designed to amplify the bearer's magic.
DT_ItemEquipments.shield_009.Description:
Press {0} to activate a barrier that momentarily
nullifies enemy attacks.
While it offers only a brief window of defense,
the SP gauge greatly increases when
timed correctly.

DT_ItemKeys.key_higher_a.Name: Frost Lord's Mark
DT_ItemKeys.key_higher_a.Description:
A piece of the key that grants entry
to the Upper Stratum.
DT_ItemKeys.key_higher_a.FlavorText:
A key that was made prior to the rivalry between
the Miliuses and Frosts. It allowed its bearers
passage through the Upper Stratum in secrecy.
DT_ItemKeys.key_higher_b.Name: Milius Lord's Mark
DT_ItemKeys.key_higher_b.Description:
A piece of the key that grants entry
to the Upper Stratum.
DT_ItemKeys.key_higher_b.FlavorText:
A key that was made prior to the rivalry between
the Miliuses and Frosts. It allowed its bearers
passage through the Upper Stratum in secrecy.
DT_ItemKeys.key_lower.Name: Lower Stratum Key
DT_ItemKeys.key_lower.Description:
A key that unlocks the Magic Gates
found around the Lower Stratum.
DT_ItemKeys.key_lower.FlavorText:
The Lower Stratum teems with hazardous zones,
to which citizens of the Lower and Central
stratums are not permitted entry.
DT_ItemKeys.key_owner.Name: Grand Sorcerer's Key
DT_ItemKeys.key_owner.Description:
A key that unlocks the rear entrance to
Declan's estate, as well as various Magic Gates.
DT_ItemKeys.key_owner.FlavorText:
As the administrator of the Sorcerer's Academy,
Declan was considered the Land of Fumes' foremost
practitioner of magic. However, once he dedicated
himself to studying Homunculi, his obsessive
nature drove him to isolating himself in his
home, seldom interacting with the outside world.
DT_ItemKeys.key_ruins_tuto.Name: Subterranean Testing Site Key
DT_ItemKeys.key_ruins_tuto.Description:
A key that unlocks the Magic Gate leading
to the Subterranean Testing Site.
DT_ItemKeys.key_ruins_tuto.FlavorText:
The Subterranean Testing Site is
currently closed and off-limits.

DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv2_b.Name: Experimental Amplifier
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv2_b.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv2_b.FlavorText:
A device fitted into the armaments of Homunculi.
It is capable of augmenting arcane instruments,
and can be used to amplify a Homunculus' magic.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv2_c.Name: Mixed Parts
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv2_c.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv2_c.FlavorText:
An assortment of parts from the Lower Stratum.
Homunculi in the Lower Stratum were rarely
supplied with sufficient parts in the event
of a malfunction, and it is said that working
Homunculi cores are even more scarce.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv3_a.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv3_b.Name: Obsolete Core
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv3_b.Description:
Parts that can be used to unlock
and strengthen abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv3_b.FlavorText:
A Homunculus core that was once in common use.
It was among the first cores put into production.
The outer casing meant to protect the
Homunculus' soul has a defect in it.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv3_c.Name: Antiquated Parts
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv3_c.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv3_c.FlavorText:
Commonly found in the Lower Stratum.
Beyond their uses to Attuners, Homunculus parts
can serve a variety of other functions, such as
being repurposed for arcane instruments.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv4_a.Name: New Model Core
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv4_a.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv4_a.FlavorText:
Homunculus cores commonly found in the
Central Stratum. Due to the outer casing's
low resistance to magic, they are susceptible
to corruption from the Fumes, which has led
to innumerable outbreaks of Mutants.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv4_b.Name: Magic Amplifier
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv4_b.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv4_b.FlavorText:
A magic amplification vial prevalent in
the Central Stratum. These were often fitted
in Homunculi that were designed for battle,
such as guards.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv4_c.Name: New Model Parts
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv4_c.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv4_c.FlavorText:
Parts prevalent in the Central Stratum.
They contain fewer impurities than
conventional parts, which makes them
highly effective for transmitting magic.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv5_a.Name: Special Alloy Core
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv5_a.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv5_a.FlavorText:
A core developed to withstand the depths of
the Lower Stratum. The cores of Homunculi that
have gone berserk—called Inert Cores—cannot
be removed. It is most rare to find cores that
have remained intact in the Land of Fumes.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv5_b.Name: Special Alloy Amplifier
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv5_b.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv5_b.FlavorText:
A device built into the armaments of Homunculi.
This robust amplifier is able to withstand heavy
loads of magic.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv5_c.Name: Special Alloy Part
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv5_c.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv5_c.FlavorText:
Parts that make up the body and armaments
of a Homunculus. They are used in Homunculi
engaged in rigorous labor, such as those
working at the Arcane Factory.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv6_a.Name: Origin Gem Core
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv6_a.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv6_a.FlavorText:
A luminescent pearl extracted from a primordial
organism inhabiting the Land of Origin.
Similar to an egg, it holds the essence of life.
It is bound to the magic that emanates from
the Land of Origin.
The discovery of Origin Gems paved the way
for cores and the creation of Homunculi.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv6_b.Name: Administrator's Amplifier
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv6_b.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv6_b.FlavorText:
A top-of-the-line amplifier, developed using
the most advanced Milius technology.
Its ability to conduct magic far exceeds
that of other amplifiers.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv6_c.Name: Highest-grade Parts
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv6_c.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_lv6_c.FlavorText:
Sophisticated parts that are circulated only
within the Upper Stratum and subjected to a
rigorous quality-control process.
Most custom-made Homunculi were produced by
the Milius brothers, Cain and Declan.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_s5000_a.Name: Unidentified Core
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_s5000_a.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance Nola's abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_s5000_a.FlavorText:
A special core created in secret by House Milius.
It was never commercially produced.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_s5000_b.Name: Unidentified Amplifier
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_s5000_b.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance Nola's abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_s5000_b.FlavorText:
A magic amplifier developed in secret by
House Milius. It only reacts to the magicite
embedded within Nola's weapon.
Likely developed specifically for Nola's use.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_s5000_c.Name: Unidentified Transformer
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_s5000_c.Description:
Components that can be used to unlock
and enhance Nola's abilities.
DT_ItemMaterials.parts_s5000_c.FlavorText:
A magic transformer developed by House Milius.
Highly proprietary, it is an essential component
in the transformation mechanism of Nola's weapon.

DT_ItemNPCInfo.n7020_gordon.Description:
The arcane smith of Old City in the Lower Stratum.
A pillar of the community, Gordon has designed a
number of arcane instruments essential to the
city's wellbeing. A number of Old City residents
have been fitted with the “Silencing Light,” an
arcane instrument developed by House Milius,
that exacts a heavy toll from the wearer.
Gordon has taken it upon himself to modify every
last one in Old City to nullify its effects.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.p0000_lilac.Description:
Of unknown birth, but believed to be an Attuner.
With no recollection of the past prior to
waking up in the Subterranean Testing Site,
Lilac's only clue is the faint memory of
a crying woman.
Brimming with curiosity and a natural fondness
for Homunculi, Lilac aids them without fear
or prejudice.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5000_reaper.Description:
An enigmatic combat Homunculus that had been
abandoned at the Subterranean Testing Site.
She exudes an ancient, noble aura—most unlike
the labor Homunculi in the Lower Stratum.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5000_reaper.Description:
An enigmatic combat Homunculus that had been
abandoned at the Subterranean Testing Site.
She exudes an ancient, noble aura—most unlike
the labor Homunculi in the Lower Stratum.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5010_lancer.Description:
A Homunculus that was once in the service
of the Attuner Joran. Dubbed the “Lucent Knight”
due to his appearance, he led the Homunculi
of House Frost.
When war broke out between Milius and Frost,
he took to the front lines and is said never
to have met defeat at the hands of an opponent.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5030_rogue.Description:
A discarded test subject from a Homunculus
processing plant. He was one of many Homunculi
that were exposed to the Fumes as part of an
experiment to observe how long they could
withstand its effects before turning rabid.
As the Fumes took hold, hordes of Homunculi
tore through one another, climbing the resulting
pile of corpses in a frenzied bid to escape.
Lito survived by being buried beneath the pile.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5040_maiden.Description:
House Frost's longest-serving Homunculus.
Designed to resemble a doll-like figure,
she served Abelia, Lord of House Frost herself,
both as her personal guard, as well as in matters
pertaining to her private and public affairs.
Ever since she lost Abelia, she has continued
to protect the Frost estate, alone in her grief.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5050_ronin.Description:
A combat Homunculus specially modified by
the sorcerer, Declan. His body was meticulously
picked out from a tribe of warriors hailing
from a foreign land, and subjected to a series
of experiments that imbued it with a
formidable strength. His peculiar appearance
and exotic weaponry reflect Declan's
eccentric taste. Repulsed by Declan's treatment
of Homunculi, he plotted in secret to slay him.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5060_beast.Description:
Tempered into a formidable weapon by experiments
conducted by House Milius, this Homunculus was
abandoned by his former masters after proving too
difficult to control. He was subsequently tasked with
exploring the lowest depths of the Land of Fumes,
from whence few ever re-emerge.
But emerge he did... and with an Attuner in tow.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5070_witch.Description:
A Homunculus that manages the Sorcerer's Academy.
Modeled after the sorcerer Declan, she has a
natural gift for sorcery, as well an unusually
inquisitive nature, explaining her past tenure
at the Biological Research Facility.
She harbors a strong admiration for humans,
a trait that it is believed she was born with.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5080_hawk.Description:
A Homunculus designed for reconnaissance,
restored by the Attuner Heath.
Huginn and Muninn's true potential comes
to the fore as a pair.
Huginn is a memento of Heath's late brother,
who lost his life to the Rain of Death.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5090_owl.Description:
A Homunculus scout that belonged to
the Attuner, Heath.
Long ago, sorcerers would often employ owl
familiars as messengers. Since the decline
of House Frost's sorcerers, however,
they have been replaced with Homunculi.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5110_gunman.Description:
An experimental Homunculus that escaped to
Old City from the Biological Research Facility
in the Central Stratum. Experiments involving
animal fusion were conducted on Yolvan by
a renowned Homunculus researcher who fled
a neighboring country that is no more.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5200_pounder.Description:
A large prototype Homunculus made to work
at the Magicite Mine. The excavator on his arm
is capable of breaking through tough bedrock.
He once worked at the Arcane Factory, where
he was chosen by Cain Milius to undergo
a new experimental modification—a process that
was interrupted when a widespread riot began,
carried out by Homunculi.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5210_fenris.Description:
A canine Homunculus created from
the guardian's lineage.
He was taken in by Gordon,
who found him in a weakened state.
Hati is accompanying Lilac, having taken
a liking to the young Attuner.
He likes giving people rides on his back.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5211_fenris.Description:
A canine Homunculus created from
the guardian's lineage.
He was taken in by Gordon,
who found him in a weakened state.
Hati is accompanying Lilac, having taken
a liking to the young Attuner.
Enhancements allow him to charge through
enemies and growths in walls.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5220_wirer.Description:
The son of the Lord of House Milius.
He was turned into a Homunculus by the sorcerer,
Declan, and cast into the Lower Stratum.
He once had the potential to be a great sorcerer,
but is now a shadow of his former self.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n5230_finder.Description:
Captain of the Lower Stratum Depths Survey Team,
Lars was investigating the Land of Origin
alongside Lilia and Nola.
Owing to his durability and regenerative
capabilities, he is able to withstand the harsh
conditions in the Land of Origin.
Amiable and considerate, he is rarely known
to turn someone away.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n6030_owner.Description:
Creator of the Homunculi and younger brother
of Lord Cain Milius.
Declan was a foremost expert in the field
of magic, and a gifted arcane smith,
earning him the title of Grand Sorcerer.
It is said that his nature and outlook changed
dramatically after becoming acquainted with
the priestess Abelia.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n7000_lilia.Description:
Once adorned in a mantle of azure, Lilia was
a skilled Attuner that used her talents to aid
the residents and Homunculi of the Lower Stratum.
Highly resistant to the Blight, it is said that
her talents as an Attuner surpassed those of
even Joran, and that she was chosen by Abelia
to succeed her.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n7010_levy.Description:
An orphan from the Crimson Forest, she was
taken in by Gordon and raised in Old City in
the Lower Stratum, along with her older sister.
Having been watched over by Yolvan ever since
she was a child, she is fond of Homunculi.
Her parents were Attuners, and the blood
of House Frost flows within her, granting her
a greater resistance to the Blight.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n7030_shaman.Description:
A priestess hailing from a foreign land,
she is shrouded in mystery.
Choosing to indulge things at her convenience,
she has an otherworldly air about her.
She appears to be investigating the Blight
in the Land of Fumes.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n7040_frost.Description:
Attuners operate under the organization
of House Frost. They are able to employ magic
capable of tuning Homunculi by touching their
cores and making contact with the soul within.
Attuners are also responsible for disposing
of Homunculi whose cores have gone inert.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n7041_frost.Description:
A strong-willed Attuner that reports to Joran.
Heath is the master of Muninn, and is one of
two brothers that controlled owl Homunculi.
The Blight has taken a toll on his body,
causing him considerable frustration.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n7042_frost.Description:
A somewhat timid Attuner working under Joran.
He takes pride in his knack for repairing
arcane instruments.
Yarrow views Heath as something of a rival.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n7043_frost.Description:
The second-generation Chief Attuner,
and the aide to the Lord of House Frost.
Joran used to oversee the Attuners,
but with so many having fallen victim
to Gilroy, he often opts to work alone now.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.n7063_townspeople.Description:
The first-generation Chief Attuner,
once renowned as a great sorcerer.
After choosing Joran to succeed her,
she retired to live a quiet life
in her place of birth.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5001_reaper.Description:
An enigmatic combat Homunculus that had been
abandoned at the Subterranean Testing Site.
She exudes an ancient, noble aura—most unlike
the labor Homunculi in the Lower Stratum.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5002_reaper.Description:
An enigmatic combat Homunculus that had been
abandoned at the Subterranean Testing Site.
She exudes an ancient, noble aura—most unlike
