DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5081_hawk.Description:
A Homunculus designed for reconnaissance,
restored by the Attuner Heath.
Huginn and Muninn's true potential comes
to the fore as a pair.
Huginn is a memento of Heath's late brother,
who lost his life to the Rain of Death.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5082_hawk.Description:
A Homunculus designed for reconnaissance,
restored by the Attuner Heath.
Huginn and Muninn's true potential comes
to the fore as a pair.
Huginn is a memento of Heath's late brother,
who lost his life to the Rain of Death.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5090_owl.Description:
A Homunculus scout that belonged to
the Attuner, Heath.
Long ago, sorcerers would often employ owl
familiars as messengers. Since the decline
of House Frost's sorcerers, however,
they have been replaced with Homunculi.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5091_owl.Description:
A Homunculus scout that belonged to
the Attuner, Heath.
Long ago, sorcerers would often employ owl
familiars as messengers. Since the decline
of House Frost's sorcerers, however,
they have been replaced with Homunculi.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5092_owl.Description:
A Homunculus scout that belonged to
the Attuner, Heath.
Long ago, sorcerers would often employ owl
familiars as messengers. Since the decline
of House Frost's sorcerers, however,
they have been replaced with Homunculi.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5110_gunman.Description:
An experimental Homunculus that escaped to
Old City from the Biological Research Facility
in the Central Stratum. Experiments involving
animal fusion were conducted on Yolvan by
a renowned Homunculus researcher who fled
a neighboring country that is no more.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5111_gunman.Description:
An experimental Homunculus that escaped to
Old City from the Biological Research Facility
in the Central Stratum. Experiments involving
animal fusion were conducted on Yolvan by
a renowned Homunculus researcher who fled
a neighboring country that is no more.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5112_gunman.Description:
An experimental Homunculus that escaped to
Old City from the Biological Research Facility
in the Central Stratum. Experiments involving
animal fusion were conducted on Yolvan by
a renowned Homunculus researcher who fled
a neighboring country that is no more.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5200_pounder.Description:
A large prototype Homunculus made to work
at the Magicite Mine. The excavator on his arm
is capable of breaking through tough bedrock.
He once worked at the Arcane Factory, where
he was chosen by Cain Milius to undergo
a new experimental modification—a process that
was interrupted when a widespread riot began,
carried out by Homunculi.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5220_wirer.Description:
The son of the Lord of House Milius.
He was turned into a Homunculus by the sorcerer,
Declan, and cast into the Lower Stratum.
He once had the potential to be a great sorcerer,
but is now a shadow of his former self.
DT_ItemNPCInfo.s5230_finder.Description:
Captain of the Lower Stratum Depths Survey Team,
Lars was investigating the Land of Origin
alongside Lilia and Nola.
Owing to his durability and regenerative
capabilities, he is able to withstand the harsh
conditions in the Land of Origin.
Amiable and considerate, he is rarely known
to turn someone away.

DT_ItemQuests.quest_amulet.Name: Faintly-glowing Aegis Curio
DT_ItemQuests.quest_amulet.Description:
An heirloom with the power to repress and
even purify the effects of the Blight.
It has been fine-tuned for an Attuner's use
by a priestess from a far-off land.
DT_ItemQuests.quest_amulet.FlavorText: It may be used on Lilia, in the Land of Origin.
DT_ItemQuests.quest_artifact.Name: Mutated Mineral
DT_ItemQuests.quest_artifact.Description:
A rare mineral excavated from the Magicite Mine,
permeated with fossilized Blight.
DT_ItemQuests.quest_artifact.FlavorText:
A curious item unearthed by Levy.
Someone else may have further insight to offer...
DT_ItemQuests.quest_bird.Name: Avian Remains
DT_ItemQuests.quest_bird.Description:
Parts from a Homunculus that resembles a bird,
and what looks like the remnants of a core.
DT_ItemQuests.quest_bird.FlavorText:
A curious item unearthed by Levy.
Someone else may have further insight to offer...
DT_ItemQuests.quest_board.Name: Millius Resident Records
DT_ItemQuests.quest_board.Description:
Partial records on elite members of House Milius.
It contains a record of arcane smiths.
DT_ItemQuests.quest_board.FlavorText:
A curious item unearthed by Levy.
Someone else may have further insight to offer...
DT_ItemQuests.quest_eye.Name: Blighted Pupil
DT_ItemQuests.quest_eye.Description:
What appears to be an arcane instrument.
It was in the possession of the Chief Attuner,
and emits a light that keeps the Blight in
the Land of Origin at bay.
A crack has formed on its surface
and Blight has begun to corrode it.
DT_ItemQuests.quest_eye.FlavorText:
A curious item.
Someone else may have further insight to offer...
DT_ItemQuests.quest_lithograph.Name: Stele of the Land of Origin
DT_ItemQuests.quest_lithograph.Description:
A vestige of the sorcerers of the Ancients.
It contains a description of the Blighted Fumes.
The Land of Origin was once known as
the Holy Land of the Ancients.
DT_ItemQuests.quest_lithograph.FlavorText:
A curious item unearthed by Levy.
Someone else may have further insight to offer...
DT_ItemQuests.quest_perfume.Name: Black Perfume
DT_ItemQuests.quest_perfume.Description:
A highly potent magic Fume inhaler that produces
a tranquilizing effect. No longer in production.
DT_ItemQuests.quest_perfume.FlavorText:
A curious item unearthed by Levy.
Someone else may have further insight to offer...
DT_ItemQuests.quest_stone.Name: Frost Vestige
DT_ItemQuests.quest_stone.Description:
An arcane instrument adorned with stylings
symbolic of House Frost.
It appears to be damaged beyond repair.
The name “Cassia” is engraved into it.
DT_ItemQuests.quest_stone.FlavorText:
A curious item unearthed by Levy.
Someone else may have further insight to offer...

DT_ItemSkills.s5000_sword.SpecialDescription:
Transforms the weapon into a form that deals
a powerful frontal blow.
DT_ItemSkills.s5000_sword.SpecialFlavorText:
The weapon's final and true form.
An instrument of utter ruination. It has had
a limiter placed on it to keep it in check.
DT_ItemSkills.s5000_sword.Name: Spirit Piercer
DT_ItemSkills.s5000_sword.Description:
A sword that deals quick attacks in close range.
Consecutive inputs perform a combo attack.
DT_ItemSkills.s5000_sword.FlavorText:
An old blade passed down to the executioner
of House Milius. A transformation mechanism
is built into it.
DT_ItemSkills.s5001_scythe.SpecialDescription:
Transforms the weapon into a form that deals
a powerful frontal blow.
DT_ItemSkills.s5001_scythe.SpecialFlavorText:
The weapon's final and true form.
An instrument of utter ruination. It has had
a limiter placed on it to keep it in check.
DT_ItemSkills.s5001_scythe.Name: Soul Harvester
DT_ItemSkills.s5001_scythe.Description:
A scythe that deals damage at close range.
Consecutive inputs perform a combo attack.
DT_ItemSkills.s5001_scythe.FlavorText:
Hushed whispers would describe the Homunculus
wielding this scythe as the personification
of death itself.
DT_ItemSkills.s5002_axe.SpecialDescription:
Transforms the weapon into a form that deals
a powerful frontal blow.
DT_ItemSkills.s5002_axe.SpecialFlavorText:
The weapon's final and true form.
An instrument of utter ruination. It has had
a limiter placed on it to keep it in check.
DT_ItemSkills.s5002_axe.Name: Vanquisher
DT_ItemSkills.s5002_axe.Description:
An axe that deals slow but powerful melee damage.
Consecutive inputs perform a combo attack.
DT_ItemSkills.s5002_axe.FlavorText:
When harsher punishment needs to be dealt,
Nola's weapon can transform into a mighty axe.
DT_ItemSkills.s5010_blaster.SpecialDescription:
The weapon is set to maximum output,
and fires a powerful beam in a straight line.
DT_ItemSkills.s5010_blaster.SpecialFlavorText:
A dispassionate barrage of destruction.
When fired at maximum output, it is said that
the Lucent Knight Reibolg himself can be seen
emanating from the flames left in its wake.
DT_ItemSkills.s5010_blaster.Name: Magic Tracer
DT_ItemSkills.s5010_blaster.Description:
Fires homing magic bullets.
Consecutive inputs fire a series of shots,
while holding the button down charges and
releases a scattered shot.
DT_ItemSkills.s5010_blaster.FlavorText:
It is said that nothing struck fear into
House Milius' Homunculi more than looking
down the barrel of Reibolg's weapon.
DT_ItemSkills.s5011_lazer.SpecialDescription:
The weapon is set to maximum output,
and fires a powerful beam in a straight line.
DT_ItemSkills.s5011_lazer.SpecialFlavorText:
A dispassionate barrage of destruction.
When fired at maximum output, it is said that
the Lucent Knight Reibolg himself can be seen
emanating from the flames left in its wake.
DT_ItemSkills.s5011_lazer.Name: Piercing Beam
DT_ItemSkills.s5011_lazer.Description:
Shoots a penetrating beam of pure magic.
Consecutive inputs will fire repeatedly.
Holding down the button will discharge
the beam with the Blaze status effect.
DT_ItemSkills.s5011_lazer.FlavorText:
Reibolg's firearm produces a beam of
intense heat, piercing right through
the enemy like a lance of pure light.
DT_ItemSkills.s5012_granade.Name: Blast Volley
DT_ItemSkills.s5012_granade.SpecialDescription:
The weapon is set to maximum output,
and fires a powerful beam in a straight line.
DT_ItemSkills.s5012_granade.SpecialFlavorText:
A dispassionate barrage of destruction.
When fired at maximum output, it is said that
the Lucent Knight Reibolg himself can be seen
emanating from the flames left in its wake.
DT_ItemSkills.s5012_granade.Description:
Expels a magic incendiary that explodes upon
contact. Consecutive inputs fire continual shots.
Holding down the button discharges an incendiary
that causes a larger explosion.
DT_ItemSkills.s5012_granade.FlavorText:
An ability that was frequently employed
to settle skirmishes with House Milius.
The explosive blitz was said to silence
entire swathes of foes.
DT_ItemSkills.s5030_punch.SpecialDescription:
The prosthetic overheats and delivers
a powerful uppercut.
DT_ItemSkills.s5030_punch.SpecialFlavorText:
Pushing beyond its own limits, the prosthetic arm
calls upon Lilac's magic to deliver justice.
DT_ItemSkills.s5030_punch.Name: Blazing Fist
DT_ItemSkills.s5030_punch.Description:
The prosthetic arm projects a flaming fist,
inflicting the Blaze status effect.
Can be used in conjunction with other abilities.
DT_ItemSkills.s5030_punch.FlavorText:
The vials fitted within the arm determine the
kind of magic the bearer may use.
DT_ItemSkills.s5031_bomb.SpecialDescription:
The prosthetic overheats and delivers
a powerful uppercut.
DT_ItemSkills.s5031_bomb.SpecialFlavorText:
Pushing beyond its own limits, the prosthetic arm
calls upon Lilac's magic to deliver justice.
DT_ItemSkills.s5031_bomb.Name: Glacial Fist
DT_ItemSkills.s5031_bomb.Description:
The user leaps forward, dealing a blow with the
prosthetic arm, inflicting the Freeze status effect.
Can be used in conjunction with other abilities.
DT_ItemSkills.s5031_bomb.FlavorText:
An ability that was in the experimental stage.
It was said that a child with a high affinity
for magic would be required to test it.
DT_ItemSkills.s5032_roket.SpecialDescription:
The prosthetic overheats and delivers
a powerful uppercut.
DT_ItemSkills.s5032_roket.SpecialFlavorText:
Pushing beyond its own limits, the prosthetic arm
calls upon Lilac's magic to deliver justice.
DT_ItemSkills.s5032_roket.Name: Rocket Fist
DT_ItemSkills.s5032_roket.Description:
Fires a projectile diagonally upward. It can
pierce enemies and bounce off solid surfaces.
Can be used in conjunction with other abilities.
DT_ItemSkills.s5032_roket.FlavorText:
The loathing he feels for his prosthetic arm
is eclipsed by Lito's desire to aid his allies.
DT_ItemSkills.s5040_reflect.SpecialDescription:
Activates restoration magic
and recovers {0}% of Lilac's HP.
DT_ItemSkills.s5040_reflect.SpecialFlavorText:
Fitted with argentine vials,
Lorna's throne-like arcane instrument
is able to channel Lilac's magic into
restorative, wound-healing energies.
DT_ItemSkills.s5040_reflect.Name: Gravity Field
DT_ItemSkills.s5040_reflect.Description:
Lorna manifests and begins to emit a continual
gravity field with her in the center.
Activating the ability a second time will
cause her to return.
DT_ItemSkills.s5040_reflect.FlavorText:
Declared taboo, gravity magic is now forbidden
and sealed from use. It is said that those who
make an enemy of Lorna are unable to even stand.
DT_ItemSkills.s5041_gravit.SpecialDescription:
Activates restoration magic
and recovers {0}% of Lilac's HP.
DT_ItemSkills.s5041_gravit.SpecialFlavorText:
Fitted with argentine vials,
Lorna's throne-like arcane instrument
is able to channel Lilac's magic into
restorative, wound-healing energies.
DT_ItemSkills.s5041_gravit.Name: Light Show
DT_ItemSkills.s5041_gravit.Description:
Lorna manifests and begins to discharge a
continual series of bolts with her in the center.
Activating the ability a second time will
cause her to return.
DT_ItemSkills.s5041_gravit.FlavorText:
The air sizzles with electricity, silencing all who
dare approach. Many an invasion by the Milius
has been thwarted by Lorna's lightning magic.
DT_ItemSkills.s5042_ignit.SpecialDescription:
Activates restoration magic
and recovers {0}% of Lilac's HP.
DT_ItemSkills.s5042_ignit.SpecialFlavorText:
Fitted with argentine vials,
Lorna's throne-like arcane instrument
is able to channel Lilac's magic into
restorative, wound-healing energies.
DT_ItemSkills.s5042_ignit.Name: Wave Pulse
DT_ItemSkills.s5042_ignit.Description:
Lorna manifests and begins to emit a continual
series of magic waves in front and behind.
Activating the ability a second time will
cause her to return.
DT_ItemSkills.s5042_ignit.FlavorText:
Gentle, yet unabating, like ripples in water,
the waves replenish an Attuner's magic.
DT_ItemSkills.s5050_moon.SpecialDescription:
A series of slashes with three blades.
This ability hits everything in sight.
DT_ItemSkills.s5050_moon.SpecialFlavorText:
A special technique that No. 7 has mastered
through surviving countless battles in the
Arena Tower.
DT_ItemSkills.s5050_moon.Name: Lunar Manifestation
DT_ItemSkills.s5050_moon.Description:
A swift dash, ending in a resolute slash.
The direction of this ability can be
controlled by quickly turning Lilac
in the desired direction.
DT_ItemSkills.s5050_moon.FlavorText:
The arcane blade “Shadow Eater”.
Cloaked in magic, it is said to be so sharp,
there is nothing it cannot cut.
DT_ItemSkills.s5051_snow.SpecialDescription:
A series of slashes with three blades.
This ability hits everything in sight.
DT_ItemSkills.s5051_snow.SpecialFlavorText:
A special technique that No. 7 has mastered
through surviving countless battles in the
Arena Tower.
DT_ItemSkills.s5051_snow.Name: Hail Dance
DT_ItemSkills.s5051_snow.Description:
An upward spinning slash that fires projectiles
of ice as it rises.
Inflicts the Freeze status effect.
Lilac can move while this ability is active.
DT_ItemSkills.s5051_snow.FlavorText:
The arcane blade “Ice Prison”.
Seeped in frigid mists, it was created
by Declan as an education in true agony.
DT_ItemSkills.s5052_flower.SpecialDescription:
A series of slashes with three blades.
This ability hits everything in sight.
DT_ItemSkills.s5052_flower.SpecialFlavorText:
A special technique that No. 7 has mastered
through surviving countless battles in the
Arena Tower.
DT_ItemSkills.s5052_flower.Name: Thunder Flower
DT_ItemSkills.s5052_flower.Description:
A spinning slash that charged with lightning.
Inflicts the Shock status effect.
This ability can be steered by moving while
it is active.
DT_ItemSkills.s5052_flower.FlavorText:
The arcane blade “Tethered Thunder”.
Crackling with an electric power, it is
said to be inspired by torture devices.
DT_ItemSkills.s5060_chain.SpecialDescription:
Nullifies enemy attacks momentarily,
and counterattacks with a large number
of chains doing damage across a wide area.
DT_ItemSkills.s5060_chain.SpecialFlavorText:
The Shackled Beast was taken into House Frost
by the Chief Attuner. Although his visage
remained as stoic as ever, he was glad for
something to protect and dedicate himself to.
DT_ItemSkills.s5060_chain.Name: Chain Whip
DT_ItemSkills.s5060_chain.FlavorText:
The subject of an experiment. He has no name.
He tore free of the chains that bound him,
and word of the bloody rampage that ensued
soon spread: "It was the shackled beast."
DT_ItemSkills.s5060_chain.Description:
Nullifies enemy attacks momentarily,
and counterattacks with a chain,
dealing damage to enemies within range.
DT_ItemSkills.s5061_horn.SpecialDescription:
Nullifies enemy attacks momentarily,
and counterattacks with a large number
of chains doing damage across a wide area.
DT_ItemSkills.s5061_horn.SpecialFlavorText:
The Shackled Beast was taken into House Frost
by the Chief Attuner. Although his visage
remained as stoic as ever, he was glad for
something to protect and dedicate himself to.
DT_ItemSkills.s5061_horn.Name: Charge
DT_ItemSkills.s5061_horn.Description:
Nullifies enemy attacks momentarily,
and counters with a lunging attack.
DT_ItemSkills.s5061_horn.FlavorText:
With nary a care for its own wellbeing,
the Shackled Beast's fury guides its actions.
DT_ItemSkills.s5062_voice.SpecialDescription:
Nullifies enemy attacks momentarily,
and counterattacks with a large number
of chains doing damage across a wide area.
DT_ItemSkills.s5062_voice.SpecialFlavorText:
The Shackled Beast was taken into House Frost
by the Chief Attuner. Although his visage
remained as stoic as ever, he was glad for
something to protect and dedicate himself to.
DT_ItemSkills.s5062_voice.Name: Benumbed Howl
DT_ItemSkills.s5062_voice.Description:
Nullifies enemy attacks momentarily, and counters
with a piercing howl. The howl bypasses the
enemy's defenses and inflicts the
Freeze status effect.
DT_ItemSkills.s5062_voice.FlavorText:
An inhuman cry, not unlike those heard during the
biological experiments involving animal fusion.
DT_ItemSkills.s5070_fire.SpecialDescription:
A powerful spell that releases a torrent of fire
in front, lightning above and below, and ice at
the rear. Each element inflicts the Blaze, Shock,
and Freeze status effects respectively.
DT_ItemSkills.s5070_fire.SpecialFlavorText:
Luiseach's unique brand of sorcery
set her apart from her peers, and led
to the inception of a new form of magic.
DT_ItemSkills.s5070_fire.Name: Volcanic
DT_ItemSkills.s5070_fire.Description:
Spews a volley of fire-based magic for
as long as the button is held, inflicting
the Blaze status effect. Lilac is able to
move and jump while using this ability.
DT_ItemSkills.s5070_fire.FlavorText:
A living organism designed to be a clone
of the sorcerer Declan, Luiseach has
learned much from her progenitor.
DT_ItemSkills.s5071_thunder.SpecialDescription:
A powerful spell that releases a torrent of fire
in front, lightning above and below, and ice at
the rear. Each element inflicts the Blaze, Shock,
and Freeze status effects respectively.
DT_ItemSkills.s5071_thunder.SpecialFlavorText:
Luiseach's unique brand of sorcery
set her apart from her peers, and led
to the inception of a new form of magic.
DT_ItemSkills.s5071_thunder.Name: Whirlwind
DT_ItemSkills.s5071_thunder.Description:
Twin lightning tornadoes activate in front
and behind for as long as the button is held,
inflicting the Shock status effect. Lilac is
able to move and jump while using this ability.
DT_ItemSkills.s5071_thunder.FlavorText:
Most sorcerers are unable to use magic
without the aid of an arcane instrument.
Luiseach, however, is bound by no such
limitations.
DT_ItemSkills.s5072_ice.SpecialDescription:
A powerful spell that releases a torrent of fire
in front, lightning above and below, and ice at
the rear. Each element inflicts the Blaze, Shock,
and Freeze status effects respectively.
DT_ItemSkills.s5072_ice.SpecialFlavorText:
Luiseach's unique brand of sorcery
set her apart from her peers, and led
to the inception of a new form of magic.
DT_ItemSkills.s5072_ice.Name: Cocytus
DT_ItemSkills.s5072_ice.Description:
An icy mist is discharged for as long
as the button is held, inflicting the
Freeze status effect. Lilac is able to
move and jump while using this ability.
DT_ItemSkills.s5072_ice.FlavorText:
Through her research into magic, Luiseach
has learned much about humans and come to
develop a strong admiration for them.
DT_ItemSkills.s5080_wing.SpecialDescription:
Cloaks Lilac in wind magic,
increasing attack power for a duration.
DT_ItemSkills.s5080_wing.SpecialFlavorText:
Huginn's iron will becomes one with
Lilac's magic, signifying the bond
between the two.
DT_ItemSkills.s5080_wing.Name: Gust Wing
DT_ItemSkills.s5080_wing.Description:
Follows behind Lilac, unleashing a razor-sharp
wave of magic in time with dodges.
DT_ItemSkills.s5080_wing.FlavorText:
Tempestuous by nature, Huginn accompanied
his lord to the front lines, fighting
until he could no longer move.
DT_ItemSkills.s5081_trail.SpecialDescription:
Cloaks Lilac in wind magic,
increasing attack power for a duration.
DT_ItemSkills.s5081_trail.SpecialFlavorText:
Huginn's iron will becomes one with
Lilac's magic, signifying the bond
between the two.
DT_ItemSkills.s5081_trail.Name: Poison Cloud
DT_ItemSkills.s5081_trail.Description:
Follows behind Lilac, releasing a cloud
of Fumes in time with dodges.
The Fumes ignore the enemy's defenses,
inflicting continual damage for a brief period.
DT_ItemSkills.s5081_trail.FlavorText:
Although Huginn treats Muninn like his younger
sister, Muninn tends to be more withdrawn.
DT_ItemSkills.s5082_gast.SpecialDescription:
Cloaks Lilac in wind magic,
increasing attack power for a duration.
DT_ItemSkills.s5082_gast.SpecialFlavorText:
Huginn's iron will becomes one with
Lilac's magic, signifying the bond
between the two.
DT_ItemSkills.s5082_gast.Name: Flaming Feather
DT_ItemSkills.s5082_gast.Description:
Follows behind Lilac, hurling feathers of flame
in time with dodges. The feathers travel far
and can inflict the Blaze status effect.
DT_ItemSkills.s5082_gast.FlavorText:
Huginn still carries the regret of being unable
to protect his lord. It is the reason he fights
so valiantly alongside Lilac, who reminds him
of his former master.
DT_ItemSkills.s5090_homing.SpecialDescription:
Cloaks Lilac in wind magic,
bolstering defense for a duration.
DT_ItemSkills.s5090_homing.SpecialFlavorText:
Responding to her wish to protect Lilac,
Muninn's heart has opened to a new power.
DT_ItemSkills.s5090_homing.Name: Seeker
DT_ItemSkills.s5090_homing.Description:
Follows behind Lilac, firing magic homing bullets
at enemies within range.
DT_ItemSkills.s5090_homing.FlavorText:
Animals were often the subject of experiments.
The familiars of sorcerers in particular.
DT_ItemSkills.s5091_stun.SpecialDescription:
Cloaks Lilac in wind magic,
bolstering defense for a duration.
DT_ItemSkills.s5091_stun.SpecialFlavorText:
Responding to her wish to protect Lilac,
Muninn's heart has opened to a new power.
DT_ItemSkills.s5091_stun.Name: Stun
DT_ItemSkills.s5091_stun.Description:
Follows behind Lilac, attacking enemies
within range with a mighty thunderbolt.
Inflicts the Shock status effect.
DT_ItemSkills.s5091_stun.FlavorText: Owls were popular familiars among sorcerers.
DT_ItemSkills.s5092_fall.SpecialDescription:
Cloaks Lilac in wind magic,
bolstering defense for a duration.
DT_ItemSkills.s5092_fall.SpecialFlavorText:
Responding to her wish to protect Lilac,
Muninn's heart has awakened to a new power.
DT_ItemSkills.s5092_fall.Name: Bombard
DT_ItemSkills.s5092_fall.Description:
Follows behind Lilac, releasing explosives when
enemies are within range. The explosives detonate
upon contact, dealing damage over a wide area.
DT_ItemSkills.s5092_fall.FlavorText:
Familiars were often used for reconnaissance,
but were just as useful for relaying messages
and delivering items of importance.
DT_ItemSkills.s5110_gatling.SpecialDescription:
Transforms into Caladrius, setting off
powerful bursts of magic in front.
DT_ItemSkills.s5110_gatling.SpecialFlavorText:
Using the ways of an Attuner, Lilac can enable
Yolvan to plumb the depths of his Mutant power.
DT_ItemSkills.s5110_gatling.Name: Barrage
DT_ItemSkills.s5110_gatling.Description:
Fires a stream of auto-aiming magic bullets
for as long as the button is held.
Lilac is able to move and jump while using
this ability.
DT_ItemSkills.s5110_gatling.FlavorText:
Yolvan's double-barreled pistol, fashioned by
House Milius. As long as magic courses through him,
it shall never run out of bullets.
DT_ItemSkills.s5111_saw.SpecialDescription:
Transforms into Caladrius, setting off
powerful bursts of magic in front.
DT_ItemSkills.s5111_saw.SpecialFlavorText:
Using the ways of an Attuner, Lilac can enable
Yolvan to plumb the depths of his Mutant power.
DT_ItemSkills.s5111_saw.Name: Lacerate
DT_ItemSkills.s5111_saw.Description:
Fires spinning blades that cut through enemies,
for as long as the button is held. The blades
ricochet off terrain. Lilac is able to move
and jump while using this ability.
DT_ItemSkills.s5111_saw.FlavorText:
A pair of small pistols fashioned by House Milius.
They can be augmented with various attachments,
greatly altering their performance.
DT_ItemSkills.s5112_drill.SpecialDescription:
Transforms into Caladrius, setting off
powerful bursts of magic in front.
DT_ItemSkills.s5112_drill.SpecialFlavorText:
Using the ways of an Attuner, Lilac can enable
Yolvan to plumb the depths of his Mutant power.
DT_ItemSkills.s5112_drill.Name: Eviscerate
DT_ItemSkills.s5112_drill.Description:
A spinning tornado that ignores the enemy's
defenses and continually does break damage
for as long as the button is held.
Lilac is able to move and jump while
using this ability.
DT_ItemSkills.s5112_drill.FlavorText:
A weapon crafted by Yolvan, motivated by
his desire to aid Lilac.

DT_ItemSpirits.s5000_reaper.FlavorText:
An enigmatic combat Homunculus that had been
abandoned at the Subterranean Testing Site.
She exudes an ancient, noble aura—most unlike
the labor Homunculi in the Lower Stratum.
DT_ItemSpirits.s5010_lancer.FlavorText:
A Homunculus that was once in the service
of the Attuner Joran. Dubbed the “Lucent Knight”
due to his appearance, he led the Homunculi
of House Frost.
When war broke out between Milius and Frost,
he barricaded himself within the Tethered Steeple
to defend their territory.
DT_ItemSpirits.s5030_rogue.FlavorText:
A discarded test subject from a Homunculus
processing plant. He was one of many Homunculi
that were exposed to the Fumes as part of an
experiment to observe how long they could
withstand its effects before turning rabid.
As the Fumes took hold, hordes of Homunculi
tore through one another, climbing the resulting
pile of corpses in a frenzied bid to escape.
Lito survived by being buried beneath the pile.
DT_ItemSpirits.s5040_maiden.FlavorText:
House Frost's longest-serving Homunculus.
Designed to resemble a doll-like figure,
she served Abelia, Lord of House Frost herself,
both as her personal guard, as well as in matters
pertaining to her private and public affairs.
Ever since she lost Abelia, she has continued
to protect the Frost estate, alone in her grief.
DT_ItemSpirits.s5050_ronin.FlavorText:
A combat Homunculus specially modified by
the sorcerer, Declan. His body was meticulously
picked out from a tribe of warriors hailing
from a foreign land, and subjected to a series
of experiments that imbued it with a
formidable strength. His peculiar appearance
and exotic weaponry reflect Declan's
eccentric taste. Repulsed by Declan's treatment
of Homunculi, he plotted in secret to slay him.
DT_ItemSpirits.s5060_beast.FlavorText:
Tempered into a formidable weapon by experiments
conducted by House Milius, this Homunculus was
abandoned by his former masters after proving too
difficult to control. He was subsequently tasked with
exploring the lowest depths of the Land of Fumes,
from whence few ever re-emerge.
But emerge he did... and with an Attuner in tow.
DT_ItemSpirits.s5070_witch.FlavorText:
A Homunculus that manages the Sorcerer's Academy.
Modeled after the sorcerer Declan, she has a
natural gift for sorcery, as well an unusually
inquisitive nature, explaining her past tenure
at the Biological Research Facility.
She harbors a strong admiration for humans,
a trait that it is believed she was born with.
DT_ItemSpirits.s5080_hawk.FlavorText:
A Homunculus designed for reconnaissance,
restored by the Attuner Heath.
Huginn and Muninn's true potential comes
to the fore as a pair.
Huginn is a memento of Heath's late brother,
who lost his life to the Rain of Death.
DT_ItemSpirits.s5090_owl.FlavorText:
A Homunculus scout that belonged to
the Attuner, Heath.
Long ago, sorcerers would often employ owl
familiars as messengers. Since the decline
of House Frost's sorcerers, however,
they have been replaced with Homunculi.
DT_ItemSpirits.s5110_gunman.FlavorText:
An experimental Homunculus that escaped to
Old City from the Biological Research Facility
in the Central Stratum. Experiments involving
animal fusion were conducted on Yolvan by
a renowned Homunculus researcher who fled
a neighboring country that is no more.

DT_ItemStats.hp_up_l.Name: Charmed Ore
DT_ItemStats.hp_up_l.FlavorText:
A large piece of magicite contained within an
argentine vial. It bears a rune that activates
protective magic to aid the bearer.
It is rumored to be the invention of a witch
from Land's End, east of the Land of Fumes.
DT_ItemStats.hp_up_s.Name: Charmed Fragment
DT_ItemStats.hp_up_s.FlavorText:
A fragment of magicite, contained within an
argentine vial. The higher the concentration
of magicite, the stronger the magic.
DT_ItemStats.passive_slot_l.Name: Tripartite Magic Vial
DT_ItemStats.passive_slot_l.FlavorText:
Three vials have been connected to one another
to form this arcane instrument.
It absorbs and stores trace amounts of magic
present in the air, making it highly efficient.
DT_ItemStats.passive_slot_s.Name: Magic Vial
DT_ItemStats.passive_slot_s.FlavorText:
A device that facilitates the use of
arcane instruments. Simpler magic uses
runes while complex magic requires vials.
DT_ItemStats.shop_line_up.Name: Grimoire
DT_ItemStats.shop_line_up.Description: Unlocks new items that can be forged at craftories.
DT_ItemStats.shop_line_up.FlavorText:
An excerpt from a House Milius grimoire.
It contains plans for arcane instruments.

DT_ItemTips.tip_administrationrecord_01.Name: Factory Management Records
DT_ItemTips.tip_administrationrecord_01.Description:
By order of factory administrator Cain Milius:
Authority over the Empyrean Parasol and
all Homunculi is hereby transferred to
the Homunculus Gilroy.
In light of the above, authority over all
manufacturing operations is hereby transferred
to Velgrynd and Velnest.
DT_ItemTips.tip_bloodstaineddiary_01.Name: Bloodstained Diary
DT_ItemTips.tip_bloodstaineddiary_01.Description:
Another one of us sent to the cells.
How many does this make now?
Declan enjoys tormenting Homunculi
to see how they react.
No. 7 was strong, so he got sent to
the Arena Tower for trying to defy Declan...
But most just get sent to the cells.
And we'll never see them again...
DT_ItemTips.tip_caladriusrecord_01.Name: Caladrius Records
DT_ItemTips.tip_caladriusrecord_01.Description:
Subject: Caladrius
Fusion with avian species during cultivation
stage successful.
Mental state is clouded and unstable.
The durability of the enhanced body remains
an unresolved issue.
Form highly dependent on mental state.
Note: Based upon the findings from Blighted
fusion with avian species in a foreign nation.
DT_ItemTips.tip_cassiabook_01.Name: Cassia's Grimoire
DT_ItemTips.tip_cassiabook_01.Description:
Concerning the growths in the Forest:
When the Inert Core of a Mutant bonds
strongly with the Blight, it manifests
in the form of these barriers.
Should one wish to destroy them, they
would require magic linked deeply to
the origin, such as that possessed
by Veol, the forest's guardian.
DT_ItemTips.tip_chieftunerjournal_01.Name: Chief Attuner's Journal
DT_ItemTips.tip_chieftunerjournal_01.Description:
Control over Homunculi is said to be similar
to the magic of another time, that was capable
of manipulating the soul itself.
A priestess of the Ancient people, who inhabited
this land at one time, is said to have taken
control of souls in this way to grow her power.
It seems this ancient sorcery can only be
inherited through blood. It was desperately
sought by the sorcerers of House Frost.
DT_ItemTips.tip_corrosionboard_01.Name: Corroded Warning Sign
DT_ItemTips.tip_corrosionboard_01.Description:
Do not dispose of Homunculi in the waterway!
Homunculi of dubious nature have been sighted.
Turning back is recommended.

- Milius Homunculus Guard Corps
DT_ItemTips.tip_degrandsrecord_01.Name: Declan's Records
DT_ItemTips.tip_degrandsrecord_01.Description:
No. 78
- Fusion with beast from Crimson Forest
- Blight influence: increased muscle strength,
  hair loss, mental confusion

No. 79
- Combat organism based on No. 7
- Increased aggression, partial physical mutation

No. 99
- Priestess specimen obtained from Abelia
- Experiment failed; recycling what is usable
DT_ItemTips.tip_disposaljournal_01.Name: Blighted Note
DT_ItemTips.tip_disposaljournal_01.Description:
To whoever has the misfortune of coming across
this letter, do me the honor of seeing to it
that my arcane instrument is left in good hands.

For someone that spent so much of her life
running away, things down here were pretty good.

There is a cruel finality to death, but my
belongings will serve as proof that I lived.
DT_ItemTips.tip_engineermemoirs_01.Name: Arcane Smith's Musings
DT_ItemTips.tip_engineermemoirs_01.Description:
Among the Frost sorcerers, there were those that
dreamed of new technologies and possibilities.
These dreams led them to the door of House Milius.
I was one of them. One could say I betrayed
House Frost at the lowest point in its history.
Frost and Milius... The two are said to have
walked a common path once... but the ways of
a sorcerer and the views of an arcane smith
illustrate the differences between the two.
DT_ItemTips.tip_enhancementplan_01.Name: Miner Enhancement Project
DT_ItemTips.tip_enhancementplan_01.Description:
Subject: Prototype Excavator
High-output booster to be installed.
Jet propulsion will improve mobility
and expand minable terrain.
Flight test successful.
Full-scale procedure pending return
of factory administrator Cain Milius.
DT_ItemTips.tip_fightingtower_01.Name: Arena Tower Flyer
DT_ItemTips.tip_fightingtower_01.Description:
Welcome to the Arena Tower!
A frenzied feast of mighty Homunculi
created by the sorcerer Declan!
Predict the outcomes of these death matches
between Homunculi and claim your prize!
DT_ItemTips.tip_freeze_01.Name: Survey Team's Notes
DT_ItemTips.tip_freeze_01.Description:
Finally at the Crystalline Realm.
Need to be wary of the frigid Fumes spewing
from every corner—highly dangerous.
Pushing on with the aid of the
Lower Stratum Depths Survey Team.
Land of Origin within our reach, but road
ahead more treacherous than expected.
DT_ItemTips.tip_frostsrecord_01.Name: Frost Confidential Records 1
DT_ItemTips.tip_frostsrecord_01.Description:
From Purifier to Tuner.
A “Purifier” is a device that would be built by
implanting an artificially made priestess into
a culture tube.
A “Tuner” is a device meant to absorb the Blight
generated during the purification process,
thereby relieving Frost sorcerers of the burden.
Today, Purifiers are used as Tuners, and are
invaluable in controlling the soul present
in Homunculi cores, as the process is always
accompanied by the threat of Blight.
DT_ItemTips.tip_frostsrecord_02.Name: Frost Confidential Records 2
DT_ItemTips.tip_frostsrecord_02.Description:
The introduction of the “Silencing Light,”
an arcane instrument by House Milius, has led
to a sharp decline in the Blighted's numbers.
It has forced sorcerers whose trade was to
purify the Blighted to become Attuners instead.
Lady Abelia is sure to be resentful about this
turn of events—considering the Silencing Light
was created by repurposing the very research
we Frosts painstakingly conducted into Homunculi.
DT_ItemTips.tip_frostgrimoire_01.Name: Book of the Blighted
DT_ItemTips.tip_frostgrimoire_01.Description:
Neither the body nor the mind can resist the Blight.
In time, it assails even the soul, and rot consumes
the whole. The rot exhibits remarkable regenerative
properties, granting undying flesh to the Blighted.
In the process, however, the mind is consumed by
the Blight's rage, until only madness remains.
Only the miracle of the priestesses can bring
salvation to the Blighted.
DT_ItemTips.tip_gilroysterminal_01.Name: Gilroy's Communication Device
DT_ItemTips.tip_gilroysterminal_01.Description:
Gilroy,
As you well know, I consider you my other self.
This is not only because you were created from
a biological replica of me, but also because,
for better or worse, you and I are exceedingly
similar in countless other ways. As such, I have
been forced to place a most heavy burden on you.
Rest assured, I know that the pain of sustaining
the barrier is immeasurable, and I am preparing
a Homunculus to succeed you in this painful duty.
I ask that you endure a little longer.
- Cain Milius
DT_ItemTips.tip_gilroyrecords_01.Name: Gilroy Examination Record
DT_ItemTips.tip_gilroyrecords_01.Description:
Subject: Gilroy
Regular replacement of parts and equipment
has succeeded in temporarily delaying the
effects of Blight corruption.
A link to the magic of origin, necessary for
maintenance of the barrier, puts a strain on
the subject and affects Blight advancement.
Note: Core in inert (untunable) state.
Astoundingly, subject maintains consciousness,
but condition is designated Critical.
DT_ItemTips.tip_homunculusrecord_01.Name: Homunculus Research Log 1
DT_ItemTips.tip_homunculusrecord_01.Description:
Artificial life forms created through the infusion
of magic. They are augmented by Milius arcane
smiths and boast high physical capabilities
and durability.

Although they pose no danger to humans,
magic that affects the consciousness is used
to ensure Homunculi remain true to their purpose.
However, these methods require Tuning
from time to time.
DT_ItemTips.tip_homunculusrecord_02.Name: Homunculus Research Log 2
DT_ItemTips.tip_homunculusrecord_02.Description:
Requiring neither food nor water, Homunculi
instead find sustenance in magical energies.
Through the preservation and replication of
the soul, it has also become possible to create
Homunculi with regenerative abilities—capable of
withstanding the Blight in the Lower Stratum.
Before long, we shall be able to plumb
its lowermost depths.
The Land of Origin is within our reach.
DT_ItemTips.tip_landend_01.Name: Words on Land's End
DT_ItemTips.tip_landend_01.Description:
The land once ruled by the Ancient peoples
was annexed by a foreign power and divided
into six nations. In time, the people of these
nations came to be plagued by the wrath of
the Verboten Domain, where it is said that
the resentment of the Ancients still festered.
Land's End, founded in the north by a lord with
an army of great knights, was situated closest
to the Verboten Domain, and suffered greatly
at the hands of the Blighted.
DT_ItemTips.tip_lightsilence_01.Name: “Silencing Light” Documents
DT_ItemTips.tip_lightsilence_01.Description:
Silencing Light: A portable arcane instrument
presently in the experimental stages.
Aim: To nullify the effect of the Fumes.
The device detects when Blight infestation has
exceeded the limits of the purification vials,
and releases a lethal gas before the carrier
can transform into a “Blighted”.
It is being mandated that all residents of the
Lower Stratum, which is at greater risk from
the Fumes, carry it on their person.
DT_ItemTips.tip_liliasdiary_01.Name: Lilia's Diary
DT_ItemTips.tip_liliasdiary_01.Description:
Will there be another experiment today?
While the process has been trying, watching
Lilac grow has become my secret joy.
For a child, Lilac has been taking to the ways
of an Attuner remarkably quickly.
Good. That's what you need to survive.
Is this how a mother would feel raising a child?
Or an older sister, perhaps?
All I can say for certain is that Lilac brings
a smile to my face like no one else can.
I hope we can greet tomorrow together again.
DT_ItemTips.tip_lowestrecord_01.Name: Depths Survey Record
DT_ItemTips.tip_lowestrecord_01.Description:
1st Survey of the Depths
Captain: Chief Attuner Joran
Attuners: Jared, Alon, Linden
Attuner Lilia absent at Joran's request
Accompanying Homunculi:
Shackled Beast, 10 Miners, 10 Excavators
From the 2nd survey onward,
a newly formed advanced survey team
will conduct regular investigations.
DT_ItemTips.tip_magicrecord_01.Name: Magicite Mining Record
DT_ItemTips.tip_magicrecord_01.Description:
The abundance of magical resources excavated from
the Lower Stratum yielded a bevy of anomalies,
including but not limited to those that manifest
the powers of heat and cold. Ever since,
the Land of Fumes has produced a number of
arcane instruments capable of commanding fire.
Be warned, however, for these are not to be
wielded lightly—particularly by Homunculi.
DT_ItemTips.tip_miliusbook_01.Name: Chronicles of Milius
DT_ItemTips.tip_miliusbook_01.Description:
I shall never forget the day the Rain of Death
first fell from the skies. The Blight brought
ruinous devastation down upon the nation, 
turning all it touched into undying vehicles of
madness. In its wake, Homunculi were tasked with
constructing the Empyrean Parasol, and the great
barrier of origin magic that shields us erected.
Only through the unification of House Milius'
arcane-engineering prowess and origin magic was
this feat realized. It is our proudest moment.

- Cain Milius, Lord of House Milius
DT_ItemTips.tip_mothersnote_01.Name: Mother's Note
DT_ItemTips.tip_mothersnote_01.Description:
Tomorrow's a big day for the kids.
I'm going to take care of dinner,
and you can handle the presents.
Maybe a stuffed toy? I remember
loving those as a kid myself...
Either way, I can't wait to see
what you pick out!
DT_ItemTips.tip_motleysterminal_01.Name: Motley's Communication Device
DT_ItemTips.tip_motleysterminal_01.Description:
How are you doing, Lord Motley?
Please take some time off from the academy,
whenever you should feel the need to do so.
Rest assured that, for the time being, I am
capable of carrying out Lord Cain's duties.
There is also a confidential matter I would like
to confide to you. There exists a Homunculus
with whom I am very close, and I would very much
like to introduce the two of you.
Let us meet and speak in person soon.

- Gilroy
DT_ItemTips.tip_painting_01.Name: Worries of a Sorcerer
DT_ItemTips.tip_painting_01.Description:
It is imperative we find the Land of Origin.
The magic of this nation will not last
forever... assuming we don't succumb to
the Blight first.

We have successfully proven our theories around
the application of magic in replicating and even
creating artificial life from nothing.

This is now our only hope.
DT_ItemTips.tip_prisonwall_01.Name: Words Etched Into the Cell
DT_ItemTips.tip_prisonwall_01.Description:
The Attuner came today
But the girl who's always with     wasn't
  told me about    favorite food the last time
It is called bread
   always happy when I see   
But today      emed like a different person
I'm sca  d
       hate me now??
DT_ItemTips.tip_prophecybook_01.Name: Blighted Prophecy
DT_ItemTips.tip_prophecybook_01.Description:
We, born of the Land of Origin, shall, in the
fullness of time, return to Our place of birth.
Stripped of that which is rightfully Ours by
the knave sorcerers, let Our sorrow and bile
manifest as unyielding Blight.
Thus, when the fated time should come to pass,
We shall be reborn anew in this Land of Origin,
and the world shall return to Us Ancients.
Abelia, O most pitiable priestess We have left
behind... We await your return.
DT_ItemTips.tip_raggedpastedown_01.Name: Tattered Notice
DT_ItemTips.tip_raggedpastedown_01.Description:
WARNING: The “Burrowed Beasts”
They attack when their burrow is approached.
These creatures are able to detect and consume
magicite, and are presently being studied at the
Biological Research Facility. However, if you
come across any, eliminate them as they impede
our survey. The Lower Stratum Depths Survey Team
has already suffered enough casualties.
Report eliminations to squad leader Lars.
DT_ItemTips.tip_researchersjournal_01.Name: Fugitive Researcher's Notes
DT_ItemTips.tip_researchersjournal_01.Description:
Humans that have become Blighted due to the
Rain of Death are cursed to eternal life and
cannot die. In light of this, it was decided
that they would be repurposed into vessels
or cores for Homunculi. These Homunculi are
then sent to the Lower Stratum and put
to work at the disposal site and mines,
or tasked with investigating the depths.
When did we abandon our hopes and dreams
to embark on this thankless endeavor?
DT_ItemTips.tip_ruinsrecords_01.Name: Worn Experiment Log
DT_ItemTips.tip_ruinsrecords_01.Description:
Scrapped Homunculi: Over 1400
Tuned transport Homunculi: Insufficient
No. of specimens scrapped per month: Decreasing

Contact Research Facility
DT_ItemTips.tip_searchrecord_01.Name: Homunculus Expedition Record
DT_ItemTips.tip_searchrecord_01.Description:
Beyond the gloom lies the hidden stronghold
of House Frost, sworn enemies of House Milius.
Known as the Tethered Steeple, it was once
an enormous prison meant to contain the
nation's transgressors. Search the shadows,
for the place hidden by magic lies beyond
the shroud of darkness.
DT_ItemTips.tip_secretletter_01.Name: Spy's Letter
DT_ItemTips.tip_secretletter_01.Description:
To the Elder:
Invasion by Milius Homunculi imminent.
They have their sights set on the wildlife.
The Azure Forest is to be their testing ground.
DT_ItemTips.tip_surveillancerecord_01.Name: Worker Surveillance Records
DT_ItemTips.tip_surveillancerecord_01.Description:
Subjects 511-540: Transferred to Lower Stratum
                  due to deterioration
Subject 546: No abnormalities
Subject 547: No abnormalities
Subject 560: Void due to accident
Subject 562: Exhibiting signs of defiance
             Under strict surveillance
DT_ItemTips.tip_tombstone_01.Name: Words Etched Into Stone
DT_ItemTips.tip_tombstone_01.Description:
O noble guardian
Cast thy bolt of judgment upon those
who defile the azure forest
The magic from the Land of Origin
dwells in the azure forest
The beast's wrath shall echo through
the forest, reaching to its origin.
DT_ItemTips.tip_tornjournal_01.Name: Journal of an Attuner
DT_ItemTips.tip_tornjournal_01.Description:
It's been half a year since I left my companions
and the Attuner Squad. I thought our job was to
aid the Homunculi, but the reality proved very
different. Only the most gifted Attuners are
allowed the opportunity to tune.
The rest of us with low resistance to the Blight
and a lower aptitude for magic are resigned to
collecting parts and cores from defunct Mutants.
We're just cogs in the wheel to both House Milius
and House Frost—overworked until we burn out.
DT_ItemTips.tip_tornletter_01.Name: Broken Warning Sign
DT_ItemTips.tip_tornletter_01.Description:
Warning! Entry prohibited.
Hazardous zone ahead occupied by Homunculi
who have declared themselves enemies of Milius.
Risk of Mutants.

- Milius Homunculus Guard Corps
DT_ItemTips.tip_towerumbrella_01.Name: Documents on the Empyrean Parasol
DT_ItemTips.tip_towerumbrella_01.Description:
By drawing magic from the Land of Origin,
the Empyrean Parasol is capable of emitting
an unceasing magic barrier. Precipitation
particles that fall from the barrier serve
as fuel for all Homunculi, allowing them
to operate without the need for magicite
as a power source. Continuous operation
of the barrier requires the presence of
Cain Milius, or a Homunculus replica of him.
Gilroy has been tasked with this duty
at present, but a successor must be readied
in anticipation of Blight deterioration.
DT_ItemTips.tip_townboard_01.Name: Tavern Bulletin Board
DT_ItemTips.tip_townboard_01.Description:
There has been an increase in reports of
Homunculi turning Mutant. As retrieving
cores is no longer a feasible endeavor,
ensure that you maintain a safe distance.
Additionally, while we still suffer a deficit
of Attuners, do remain vigilant with reports.

- Frost Attuner Squad
DT_ItemTips.tip_tunerjournal_01.Name: Notification of Restricted Areas
DT_ItemTips.tip_tunerjournal_01.Description:
Residents of the Lower Stratum are strictly
prohibited from entering the Magicite Mine.

The theft of magical material will result in
prosecution. Furthermore, due to an increase
in miners failing to return from the second
stratum of the Crystalline Realm, the area
will be cordoned off.
DT_ItemTips.tip_tunerletter_01.Name: Tattered Letter
DT_ItemTips.tip_tunerletter_01.Description:
Dear Sis,
Happy Birthday!
You said you wanted a new pillow, so I tried
to pluck some of Yolvan's feathers to make one.
But... he got kind of mad, so I'm going to have
Gordon teach me how to make arcane instruments
for you instead.

- Levy
DT_ItemTips.tip_upperterminal_01.Name: Upper Stratum Communication Device
DT_ItemTips.tip_upperterminal_01.Description:
Administrative District Lockdown Notice
As the Rain of Death continues to cause severe
harm to the Upper Stratum, survivors are advised
to seek shelter at the control tower, or other
similarly secure locations, and await rations.
During this period of lockdown, residents are
prohibited from leaving the Upper Stratum.
Residents that have been affected by the Blight
will be quarantined to the Central and Lower
Stratums.

- The Upper Stratum Guard
DT_ItemTips.tip_vials_01.Name: Letter in a Bottle
DT_ItemTips.tip_vials_01.Description:
Lord Motley,
How long has it been since you went missing?
Rumor has it that, after Lord Cain's death,
yours followed shortly after.
Nonetheless, we reject Declan as our new lord
and anxiously await word of your return.
May this letter find you, or someone
that knows of your whereabouts.
DT_ItemTips.tip_workerscode_01.Name: Subterranean Laborer's Code
DT_ItemTips.tip_workerscode_01.Description:
As long as the magicite yet glitters,
toil as though the very future depends
upon it... for it is your hands that
lay the foundation for House Milius.

- Squad Leader, Milius Magicite Mining Unit 1
DT_ItemTips.tip_writingwall_01.Name: Writing Etched Into the Wall
DT_ItemTips.tip_writingwall_01.Description:
There's something wrong in the mines.
It's as if everyone has gone mad. They dig
for magicite as if their very lives depended
upon it. Is it because of the Fumes?

Maybe I've gone crazy, too.
Or maybe I always was.
DT_ItemTips.tip_yoransdiary_01.Name: Joran's Notes 1
DT_ItemTips.tip_yoransdiary_01.Description:
The Pillar of Purification has been installed.
It's said that Lady Abelia and Declan
collaborated on the device together,
although I'm not certain on the specifics.
Curiosity got the better of me, and I couldn't
help but look inside... but now I wish I hadn't.
Why would Lady Abelia do this?
Is this how far we're willing to go to purify
the Blight? I don't know what to believe anymore.
DT_ItemTips.tip_yoransdiary_02.Name: Joran's Notes 2
DT_ItemTips.tip_yoransdiary_02.Description:
None of this was supposed to happen.
The Grim Reaper of Milius went berserk while
Lilia was in the process of tuning it.
That's my fault. I caused that.
Lady Abelia took me in when I was just
an orphan... and yet, I couldn't help it.
I made the only choice I could... to save Lilia.
It doesn't matter what happens to me anymore.
My sins are past forgiveness.

DT_ItemTutorials.difficulty.Name: Difficulty and Fragments
DT_ItemTutorials.difficulty.Description:
At Respites, you can change the game's difficulty.
The difficulty affects the amount of Fragments
that you receive from defeating enemies.
Fragments can be used to unlock bonus content
in the Extra menu at Respites.
DT_ItemTutorials.dive.Description:
You may now move freely in all directions
while in water, as well as perform attacks,
dodges, and healing. Explore areas under
the water to discover new paths and items.
DT_ItemTutorials.dodge_double-jump.Name: Aerial Jump and Aerial Dodge
DT_ItemTutorials.dodge_double-jump.Description:
Press {0} in the air to perform an aerial jump.
Press {1} in the air to perform an aerial dodge.
By combining aerial jumps and aerial dodges,
it is possible to cross greater distances and
reach previously-inaccessible areas.
DT_ItemTutorials.equip_equipment.Name: Equipment
DT_ItemTutorials.equip_equipment.Description:
You can change Lilac's equipment at Respites.
Equippable items can help improve your stats,
such as DEF and Heal Potency.
DT_ItemTutorials.equip_passive.Name: Equip Relics
DT_ItemTutorials.equip_passive.Description:
You can customize which Relics you have
equipped when resting at a Respite.
Relics have various effects when equipped.
Multiple Relics can be equipped within
the available slots.
DT_ItemTutorials.equip_skill.Name: Set Abilities
DT_ItemTutorials.equip_skill.Description:
Your allies' abilities can be changed at Respites.
Try experimenting with the myriad of abilities
available to you.
DT_ItemTutorials.extra_menu.Description:
Under the Extra menu at Respites, you can
change costumes, view information on enemies
and characters, and enjoy artwork from the game.
Extra can be unlocked using Fragments,
obtained by defeating enemies.
DT_ItemTutorials.fakewall.Name: Hidden Zones
DT_ItemTutorials.fakewall.Description:
Occasionally, you may chance upon hidden rooms
or paths. These are concealed by false walls
that reveal their secrets when Lilac interacts
with them.
DT_ItemTutorials.fall_damage.Name: Enemy Fall Damage
DT_ItemTutorials.fall_damage.Description:
Knocking enemies off high places deals
additional damage.
The longer the fall, the more damage they take.
Knocking enemies into water results
in an instant death.
Enemies whose break gauge is depleted
can be launched, making them prime targets.
DT_ItemTutorials.fasttravel.Name: Fast Travel
DT_ItemTutorials.fasttravel.Description:
You can travel instantaneously to Respites
you have previously visited by riding Hati.
Press {0} to open the map and select the
Respite you wish to revisit.
DT_ItemTutorials.gamemenu.Name: Main Menu
DT_ItemTutorials.gamemenu.Description:
Press {0} to open the menu.
You can view Lilac's status, equipped items,
and access the map.
DT_ItemTutorials.heal.Name: Healing Ward
DT_ItemTutorials.highjump.Name: Garm's Ascent
DT_ItemTutorials.highjump.Description:
Hold {0} while on the ground to
make Garm enter a standby state.
Press {1} in this state to perform
a powerful upward jump.
This ability can damage enemies and
destroy their parts. It can also
destroy growths in ceilings,
revealing new paths and items.
DT_ItemTutorials.hook.Name: Motley's Magic Strands
DT_ItemTutorials.hook.Description:
When near a hook point, press {0}
to use Motley's strands to grapple up to it.
While suspended, you can jump or grapple
to other hook points that are within range.
Use hook points to discover new paths
and items in high places.
DT_ItemTutorials.partsbreak.Name: Breaking Enemy Parts
DT_ItemTutorials.partsbreak.Description:
Enemy parts can be destroyed when they take fall
damage or are attacked with specific actions.
Destroying parts yields Scrap—a special resource.
However, note that there are enemies whose parts
cannot be destroyed.
DT_ItemTutorials.poundattack.Name: Garm's Iron Stake
DT_ItemTutorials.poundattack.Description:
Pressing {0}+{1} in the air will make Garm
perform a diving attack, creating a shockwave
that breaks through growths in the floor.
This ability can be used to uncover new paths
and items.
The greater your height when you perform
this move, the more the damage it will do,
allowing for thicker growths to be broken.
DT_ItemTutorials.heal.Description:
Press {0} to recover HP.
Heals are limited in number.
The number of heals available is displayed
in the upper-left corner below the HP gauge.
DT_ItemTutorials.recollection_boss.Name: Tuned Memories
DT_ItemTutorials.recollection_bossrush.Name: Boss Rush
DT_ItemTutorials.recollection_movie.Name: Blighted Memories
DT_ItemTutorials.recollection_movie.Description:
Respites allow you to rewatch cutscenes
you have previously viewed.
DT_ItemTutorials.restpoint.Name: Respites
DT_ItemTutorials.restpoint.Description:
Respites can be found in multiple locations.
Resting at a Respite will save your game,
as well as replenish Lilac's HP and heals.
However, doing so will also cause previously
defeated enemies to walk the land again.
DT_ItemTutorials.ridedash.Name: Hati's Charge
DT_ItemTutorials.ridedash.Description:
Dash continuously while on the ground to mount
Hati, and accelerate into a powerful charge.
Charging into enemies will cause damage and
destroy their parts.
Charging into growths in walls will reveal
new paths and items.
DT_ItemTutorials.spskill.Name: Attuner Arts
DT_ItemTutorials.spskill.Description:
When the SP gauge is filled, pressing {0}
along with the respective button will unleash
especially powerful skills known as Attuner Arts.
Attuner Arts also destroy enemy parts.
The SP gauge can be filled by hitting enemies
with Homunculi abilities.
DT_ItemTutorials.screwdash.Name: Motley's Torrent
DT_ItemTutorials.screwdash.Description:
Dash continuously underwater to accelerate into
a powerful charge with the aid of Motley.
Charging into enemies underwater will cause
damage and destroy their parts.
Charging into growths underwater will reveal
new paths and items.
DT_ItemTutorials.shop.Name: Craftory
DT_ItemTutorials.shop.Description:
Break boxes and mine mineral deposits that
you come across to scavenge materials.
These can be used to fabricate items
at craftories. In time, you may also be able
to find ways to expand their inventory...
DT_ItemTutorials.shop_junk.Name: Relic Refinery
DT_ItemTutorials.shop_junk.Description:
You can use a special resource called Scrap
obtained from destroying enemy parts to
slightly improve the performance of Relics
in your possession.
Each Relic can be improved up to one time.
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_beast.Name: Shackled Beast's Counter
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_beast.Description:
When activating the Shackled Beast's ability,
Lilac will momentarily assume a defensive stance,
during which enemy attacks are automatically
nullified and countered. Be warned, however, that
timing is key, and that the ability requires a
period of cooldown before it may be used again.
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_gunman.Name: Yolvan's Pressure Ability
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_gunman.Description:
Yolvan attacks continuously while following
Lilac for as long as the button is held.
You can move and jump while using this ability.
Useful for keeping up long-range pressure,
this ability's high mobility is offset by
its modest power.
Use it in tandem with Nola's close-range attacks
for maximum effectiveness.
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_hawk.Name: Huginn's Autonomous Ability
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_hawk.Description:
Upon being summoned, Huginn will follow Lilac
and attack enemies in time with dodges.
While he doesn't offer the strongest means
of offense, Huginn can be summoned and left
to his own devices, making him an invaluable
ally if one isn't comfortable using multiple
abilities in tandem.
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_lancer.Name: Reibolg's Ranged Attacks
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_lancer.Description:
Reibolg's ability allows him to fire at enemies
from a distance. Consecutive inputs lead to
repeated shots, while holding down the button
allows for powerful charge shots.
Like Nola, Reibolg can serve as one's primary
means of offense.
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_maiden.Name: Lorna's Autonomous Ability
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_maiden.Description:
Activating the ability causes Lorna to manifest,
and begin attacking enemies around her.
Activating the ability a second time will
cause her to return.
Lilac can move freely while Lorna is active;
however, wandering too far from her or breaking
the line of sight will cause Lorna to cease
attacking and return.
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_owl.Name: Muninn's Autonomous Ability
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_owl.Description:
Upon being summoned, Muninn will follow Lilac
and attack enemies that are within range.
While she doesn't offer the strongest means
of offense, Muninn can be summoned and left
to her own devices, making her an invaluable
ally if one isn't comfortable using multiple
abilities in tandem.
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_reaper.Name: Attack Using Nola
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_reaper.Description:
Nola has joined your side.
You can now make use of her abilities
by pressing {0} to attack in front of you.
Use her attacks to cut down enemies
and break certain boxes and walls.
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_rogue.Name: Lito's Cooldown Ability
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_rogue.Description:
Lito can attack independently of Lilac and Nola.
It is possible to activate Lito's ability while
attacking with Nola at the same time; however,
Lito requires a cooldown period in between uses.
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_ronin.Name: No. 7's Cooldown Ability
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_ronin.Description:
No. 7's abilities attack in sync with
Lilac's own movements.
They allow for a versatile range of approaches
to enemies, and also aid in exploration.
No. 7 requires a cooldown period in between uses.
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_witch.Name: Luiseach's Pressure Ability
DT_ItemTutorials.skill_witch.Description:
Luiseach attacks continuously while following
Lilac for as long as the button is held.
You can move and jump while using this ability.
While similar to Yolvan's ability, Luiseach
specializes in inflicting status effects.
DT_ItemTutorials.state_burn.Name: Status Effect: Blaze
DT_ItemTutorials.state_burn.Description:
If Lilac or an enemy is hit by a fire-based
attack, it may inflict the Blaze status effect,
during which HP will continually deplete
for a period of time.
Blaze eventually wears off by itself, or can
be put out more quickly by diving into water
or dashing repeatedly.
DT_ItemTutorials.state_freeze.Name: Status Effect: Freeze
DT_ItemTutorials.state_freeze.Description:
If Lilac or an enemy is hit by an ice-based
attack, it may inflict the Freeze status effect.
When an enemy is frozen, they will be rendered
immobile for a period of time. When attacked,
enemies will take greater damage but will also
be freed from their frozen state.
When frozen, Lilac's movement will slow.
DT_ItemTutorials.state_shock.Name: Status Effect: Shock
DT_ItemTutorials.state_shock.Description:
If Lilac or an enemy is hit by an electric attack,
it may inflict the Shock status effect, during which
their attack and defense will be affected for a
period of time. Shock eventually wears off by
itself, and can also be prevented through the
use of certain Relics.
DT_ItemTutorials.stun.Name: Break Damage
DT_ItemTutorials.stun.Description:
Below the enemy's HP gauge is a gauge that
represents break damage. It will decrease as
you attack enemies, and cause a knockback or
stagger effect when depleted. This is your chance
to go on the offensive. Be wary of attacks from
enemies yet to be staggered, and watch out for
counterattacks as they recover.
DT_ItemTutorials.costume.Name: Attire
DT_ItemTutorials.costume.Description: You can change Lilac's attire at Respites.
DT_ItemTutorials.restpoint_event.Name: Conversations With Allies
DT_ItemTutorials.restpoint_event.Description:
You can talk to your allies at Respites.
A notification will appear in the top-right
corner when a new conversation is available.
DT_ItemTutorials.unlock_skill.Name: Enhancing Abilities
DT_ItemTutorials.unlock_skill.Description:
You can unlock and enhance your allies' abilities
at Respites. Unlocking and enhancing abilities
requires Ability Components.
DT_ItemTutorials.walldash.Name: Lars' Swift Flight
DT_ItemTutorials.walldash.Description:
Hold {0} while clung to a wall to make
Lars enter a charged state.
Releasing {0} when fully charged will cause
Lars to dash continuously through the air,
across from the wall one is clung to.
Enemies you dash into will take damage and their
parts destroyed. This ability can also destroy
growths in walls, revealing new paths and items.
DT_ItemTutorials.wallgrab.Name: Lars' Grip
DT_ItemTutorials.wallgrab.Description:
While in the air, input {0}{1} toward a wall
to cling to it with Lars.
While clinging to a wall, press {2} to jump off.
By scaling walls, new paths and items hidden
in high places may be discovered.
Walls that slope beyond a certain angle
cannot be scaled.
DT_ItemTutorials.recollection_boss.Description:
You can challenge previously tuned
bosses at Respites.
DT_ItemTutorials.recollection_bossrush.Description:
At Respites, you can challenge a series
of previously tuned bosses.
Defeating them all awards Fragments.

DT_SpiritSkill_s5011_Lazer.1.UnlockInfos[0].UpgradeText:

Holding down the button will discharge
the beam with the Blaze status effect.

Fragment bonuses are based on difficulty setting.
The higher the difficulty, the more fragments
you obtain.
ST_Difficulty.TITLE: Difficulty
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_PLAYER_NO_HEAL_EXPLANATION: You will be unable to heal and recover your HP.
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_NO_LEAD_FX_EXPLANATION: Disable the tell effects just before an enemy attacks.
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_STAMINA_FACTOR: Enemy break and status effect resistance
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_STAMINA_RECOVERY_SPEED_FA: Enemy break and status effect recovery speed
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_PLAYER_INSTANT_KILL_EXPLANATION: Any hit taken from an enemy will result in immediate defeat.
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_ACTION_FREQUENCY_EXPLANAT: The higher the number, the more frequent enemy attacks are.
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_STAMINA_FACTOR_EXPLANATIO:
The higher the number, the more difficult it is
to stagger enemies or inflict status effects.
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_ATTACK_FACTOR_EXPLANATION: The higher the number, the more damage enemies do.
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_MAX_HP_FACTOR_EXPLANATION: The higher the number, the more health enemies have.
ST_Difficulty.SETTINGS_ENEMY_STAMINA_RECOVERY_SPEED_FA:
The higher the number, the more quickly enemies
recover from being staggered and status effects.

ST_Ending.ENDING_A_TEXT:
Even if this is A life created for someone else,
these feelings of wanting to protect you are my own.
ST_Ending.ENDING_B_TEXT:
This world might Be hell,
but we'll live on and fight back.
Because I believe the choice you made wasn't wrong.
