ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGCUT:
Proof of occupation worn by the Homunculi
working in the Magicite Mine. Fumes pervade
much of the forbidden areas, and even Homunculi
with a greater resistance to magic are not
impervious to them.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGCUT_DEBUFF_DOWN:
A tag worn by workers at the Arcane Factory.
The factory employs Homunculi that have
undergone modifications that allow them
to withstand harsh working conditions.
Despite these modifications, however,
the constant runaway incidents continue unabated.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGCUT_DEBUFF_DOWN:
Reduces damage taken from enemies by {0}%,
but increases susceptibility to status effects.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGCUT: Reduces damage taken from enemies by {0}%.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGCUT_DEBUFFED:
A toy imbued with protective magic.
It was often seen in the company
of one of the academy's students,
but its owner's whereabouts are unknown.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGCUT_DEBUFFED:
Reduces damage taken from enemies by {0}%
when inflicted with the Blaze, Freeze,
or Shock status effects.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGCUT_MAXHP:
An ornament carved from a beast of the forest.
It grants protection to the bearer, and may be
considered an arcane instrument of sorts.
It is said to have been treasured by the
priestesses of the Ancients.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGCUT_MAXHP:
Reduces damage taken from enemies by {0}%
when HP is full.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGCUT_MINHP:
An ancient talisman created by the Frosts.
It has been crafted using resources from the
forest that carry magic.
It protects the bearer from mortal wounds.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGCUT_MINHP:
Reduces damage taken from enemies by {0}%
when HP is at 50% or less.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGCUT_SPGAUGE:
Reduces damage taken from enemies by a
percentage depending on the number of
filled SP gauges.
One gauge: {0} % / Two gauges: {1} %
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGCUT_SPGAUGE:
An Inert Core that has fused with a chunk
of magicite, causing an uncanny reaction.
The result of a fusion-related accident
at the Biological Research Facility,
it pulsates constantly and reacts to magic.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_AIRBONE:
An arcane instrument imparted to Yolvan
by his friend, Levy. It was crafted under
the guidance of Master Arcane Smith Gordon.
A most precious gift.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_DEBUFFED:
A grimoire provided to teachers
at the Sorcerer's Academy.
At one time, human teachers were more
commonly employed at the academy,
but in time the repeated experiments upon
the living bodies of sorcerers yielded
Homunculi sorcerers that far surpassed humans.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGUP_DEBUFFED:
Increases damage dealt by {0}%
when Lilac is afflicted by status effects.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_GROUNDED:
A mark of comradery awarded to a warrior that
defended House Frost's territory.
The chains were fashioned by the sorcerers of
the Crimson Forest. Seeped in strong magics,
they were designed to restrain the Homunculi
of House Milius.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGUP_GROUNDED:
Increases damage dealt by {0}%
when attacking on the ground.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_MAXHP:
A charm made with magic strands
extruded by a Homunculus.
The strands are of a consistent color
and have been skillfully woven together
by the Homunculus.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGUP_MAXHP: Increases damage dealt by {0}% when HP is full.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_MINHP:
An Inert Core that has fused with a chunk
of magicite, causing an uncanny reaction.
The remnants of the soul once contained within
the Inert Core long for a more complete death,
and the magicite responds to their desire,
transforming in the process.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGUP_MINHP:
Increases damage dealt by {0}%
when HP is less than 50%.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_SKILL_AUTO:
Earrings carrying the seal of House Milius.
The ornate craftsmanship beneath the thick
coat of rust would suggest they were once
worn by the house's lord.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGUP_SKILL_AUTO:
Increases damage dealt by
autonomous abilities by {0}％
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_SKILL_COMBO:
An arcane instrument that was in development
at the Biological Research Facility.
Work on it was halted while it was still
in the prototype phase.
Originally intended to augment an Attuner's
capabilities, House Milius ceased further
development following a dispute with House Frost.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGUP_SKILL_COMBO:
Increases damage dealt by
primary abilities by {0}％.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_SKILL_DEFENCE:
An arcane instrument fashioned by the
sorcerer Declan, for use by Attuners.
It is said that, in the past, an event
would be held in the Arena Tower, where
Attuners would compete with one another
while wearing masks reminiscent of demons.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGUP_SKILL_DEFENCE:
Increases damage dealt by
Carapace counterattacks by {0}％.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_SKILL_REPEAT:
An ornament made with flowers that
would grow in the Crimson Forest,
once a lush wilderness of deep azure.
The Shackled Beast, who once guarded
the Tethered Steeple, was given this
necklace by a girl with silver hair.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGUP_SKILL_REPEAT:
Increases damage dealt by
pressure abilities by {0}％.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_SKILL_SPECIAL:
A dagger concealed by a Homunculus that had
plotted to murder Declan, covered in magicite.
After the attempt on Declan failed,
the Homunculus was sent to the holding cells.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGUP_SKILL_SPECIAL: Increases damage dealt by Attuner Arts by {0}％.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGUP_SPGAUGE:
Increases damage dealt to enemies by a percentage
depending on the number of filled SP gauges.
One gauge: {0} % / Two gauges: {1} %
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_SPGAUGE:
An arcane instrument developed by House Frost.
It was used to store the excess magic
of sorcerers whose magic potential
greatly exceeded that of others.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_SWIMMING:
A pendant worn by an Attuner that lived
with the Homunculi in the waterway.
While simple in its workmanship, it appears
to have been a gift from the Homunculi,
and remains in good condition.
The sentiment behind it makes it invaluable.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGUP_SWIMMING:
Increases damage dealt by {0}%
when attacking in water.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_TARGET_DEBUFFED:
Claws that once belonged to a Homunculus.
Declan surrounded himself with the Homunculi
most pleasing to his eye. It is said that they
provided him with both company and protection.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGUP_TARGET_DEBUFFE:
Increases damage dealt to enemies
inflicted with status effects by {0}%.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DMGUP_TARGET_STUNNED:
A pendant belonging to a cleaner stationed
at the Final Disposal Site, where garbage
from the Upper and Lower stratums is discarded.
The Homunculi tasked with cleaning duties
often find themselves assailed by the constant
shower of falling detritus, and have developed
abnormalities as a result.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DMGUP_TARGET_STUNNED:
Increases damage dealt to
staggered enemies by {0}%.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DEBUFFCUT:
Reduces the likelihood of being inflicted with
the Blaze, Freeze, and Shock status effects.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DEBUFFCUT:
An elegant ribbon often spotted among the
wealthier parts of society. How it found
its way into the Lower Stratum is a mystery.
The jewel on the ribbon is able to offer
some protection from various kinds of magic.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DEBUFF_DMGUP:
Increases the intensity of status effects
inflicted on enemies by {0}% when attacking.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DEBUFF_DMGUP_A:
A sturdy gauntlet that was equipped by
the Lower Stratum Depths Survey Team.
As the Blighted Fumes grew ever thicker,
the survey team was equipped with specialized
bodies and equipment to help withstand it.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DEBUFF_DMGUP_B:
An ancient gauntlet that was once held
by the Sorcerer's Academy.
Gifted by House Frost, it is an ominous
artifact said to be made using resources
found in the Land of Origin.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_DODGE_LONG: Slightly increases invincibility period when dodging.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_DODGE_LONG:
A small arcane instrument that envelops
the user in a magic aroma.
At one time, the Fumes posed no danger,
and did not drive humans or Homunculi
to madness.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_ENDING_FLAG:
Unleashes the full power of Nola's Attuner Art.
With it, she will be able to destroy the
Empyrean Parasol's barrier.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_ENDING_FLAG:
A ring that has been corroded by the Blight.
Lilia's power, deeply connected to the
magic of origin, resides within it.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_EXPUP:
A die imbued with a magic spell that improves
the holder's luck. Crafted in the Lower Stratum,
it is among the rarer arcane instruments.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_EXPUP: Gain +{0}% EXP after felling an enemy.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_EXPLORATION_CHARGE_S:
Reduces activation time and enhances the damage
of the actions of Garm, Hati, Motley, and Lars.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_EXPLORATION_CHARGE_SHORT:
A small arcane instrument that can be worn upon
one's person. The magicite embedded within helps
improve the bearer's magic output, making it
popular with Attuners.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_GOLDUP:
An arcane instrument created by House Frost
in ancient times. The eye sealed within is said
to have been extracted from a beast dwelling
in the Crimson Forest, and reacts to magic.
Originally conceived as part of a research
effort, it was deemed unethical by the Sorcerers'
Village and subsequently disposed of.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_GOLDUP:
Increases materials obtained
from breaking objects by {0}%.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_HEAL_SHORT:
An odd arcane instrument fashioned using a
combination of magicite and magical formulae
that accelerate the circulation of magic
in one's body.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_HIGER_MOBILITY:
Slightly increases movement speed
and jump height.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_HIGER_MOBILITY:
A small arcane instrument that can be
attached to one's shoes, or even their feet.
It is embedded with magicite and increases
the strength of the wearer's legs.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_JUNKUP:
An arcane instrument created by House Frost
in ancient times. It was stolen by garbage
collectors in Central City.
The eye sealed within glows with a reddish
hue reminiscent of Homunculi when they are
about to attack.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_JUNKUP:
Increases scrap obtained from
destroying enemy parts by {0}%.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_ONATTACK_INSTANTKILL:
Offers a low chance of instantly eliminating
enemies you attack. More formidable enemies
are immune to its effects.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_ONATTACK_INSTANTKILL:
A gleaming black ring worn by
a priestess of the Ancients.
Tomes dating back centuries mention a priestess
named Abelia, who was said to be able
to command the souls of the dead.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_ONATTACK_RESTORE_HP_:
Recovers HP by {0}% of damage inflicted.
HP will not recover if this amount is less than 1.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_ONATTACK_RESTORE_HP_DMG:
A ring worn by Cain, Lord of House Milius.
Keen to share arcane instruments with the
rest of the world, Cain spent most of his
days hard at work at the factory.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_ONATTACK_RESTORE_HP:
A ring Declan wore to protect himself.
Originally an artifact that belonged to
the Ancients, it was given to him by House Frost.
For Declan, who feared death above all else,
it was a prized treasure when he was still human.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_ONKILL_RESTORE_DMG:
Recovers HP by {0}% of damage inflicted.
Lilac will not recover if HP is below 1%.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_ONKILL_DROPS:
A chance of obtaining something
useful upon defeating enemies.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_ONKILL_DROPS:
A lustrous and most mysterious statue that has
the power to bring good fortune to the bearer.
The word “Desire” is engraved into it, but with
its head missing it remains unknown just what
it is meant to symbolize.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_ONKILL_REDUCE_COOLDOWN:
A colorful ornament holding a piece of magicite.
Exported from a foreign land, it is meant to
help maintain the styling of the wearer's hair.
Given by Declan to his favourite marionette.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_ONKILL_REDUCE_COOLDO:
Each time an enemy is defeated,
the time until a cooldown ability
can be reactivated is reduced by {0}%.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_ONKILL_RESTORE_HP:
An Inert Core that has fused with a chunk
of magicite, causing an uncanny reaction.
The remnants of the soul once contained within
the Inert Core yearn to return to life, and the
magicite responds to their mournful longing,
transforming in the process.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_ONKILL_RESTORE_HP: Recovers {0}% HP each time an enemy is defeated.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_ONKILL_RESTORE_SP:
Earrings worn by the Central Stratum's Attuners.
It is said that the Frost Attuners were forced
to move to the Central Stratum after the
Lower Stratum territories were taken from them.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_ONKILL_RESTORE_SP:
Fills the SP gauge by {0}%
each time an enemy is defeated.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_REDUCE_GRAVITY:
An arcane instrument restored by the elder
of the Sorcerers' Village.
A prototype fashioned by the Chief Attuner,
Joran, and given to his master and former
Attuner, Cassia, when he was a child.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_REDUCE_SKILL_COOLDOWN:
An ancient arcane instrument fashioned by
House Frost. The eerie blue eye enclosed within
is said never to take its gaze off the holder.
Whether or not the orb is real is another matter.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_RESTORE_SPUP: SP gained while attacking increases by {0}%.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_RESTORE_SPUP_A:
A ring that was displayed as a prize
in the Arena Tower, and stolen during
the chaos that ensued during the riots.
It has been fashioned using magicite
of exceedingly high purity, and is said
to have belonged to the Frosts' Chief Attuner.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_RESTORE_SPUP_B:
A ring from Abelia, Lord of House Frost.
The Homunculi of House Frost were created in
conjunction with those of House Milius, but it
is said that the Frosts parted with a number
of valuables as part of the arrangement
between the two houses.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION_STAMINA_DMGUP:
Increases break damage
dealt to enemies by {0}%.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_STAMINA_DMGUP_A:
A talisman worn by an Attuner who was
driven mad by the Crystalline Realm.
Tainted by the Fumes, it has lost its protective
magic and emits a frenzied destructive power.
ST_PassiveEquipText.PASSIVE_FLAVOR_STAMINA_DMGUP_B:
A can of preserved food that has been
discarded for a considerable length of time.
Manufactured at the Arcane Factory,
it appears to have been part of a trial run
for a new long-lasting food substance.
For reasons unknown, it glows with dim magic.
Both the ingredients within and manufacturing
process have not been disclosed to the public.
